name: Steve Chabot
subject: URGENT: RACE TIED!!!
body:
Democrats in Washington, D.C. are targeting this race and just released a poll that claims they can narrow this...
No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jknkyid-kujkulhluu-k/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jknkyid-kujkulhluu-r/) Patriot,Democrats in Washington, D.C. are targeting this race and just released a poll that claims they can narrow this election to a dead heat - but ONLY if they outspend us. [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jknkyid-kujkulhluu-y/) [CHIP IN NOW](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jknkyid-kujkulhluu-j/) Friend, this is a critical moment for our campaign.If we don't reach our goals for this month, out-of-state Democrats have all but said they will flood this race with outside money and negative attacks.[**Can you GIVE $10, $25, $50, OR MORE NOW!!!**](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jknkyid-kujkulhluu-t/) Nancy Pelosi and her far-left liberal allies in Washington have confirmed they have their eye on this race.I need you to stand with me and tell them to stay out of Ohio.Steve Chabot | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jknkyid-kujkulhluu-i/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jknkyid-kujkulhluu-d/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jknkyid-kujkulhluu-h/)
---|---|---
Chabot for Congress, P.O. Box 54461, Cincinnati, OH 45254
You are receiving this email because of your connection to our cause. If you receive this email in error, please use the unsubscribe link below and remove yourself from future mailings.

name: Team Hagerty
subject: Enter To Win #TeamHagerty Giveaway
body:
#TeamHagerty Updates Straight To Your Inbox
No images? [Click here](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-e-pajrik-fuutjhhtj-jj/) May 19, 2020 [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pajrik-fuutjhhtj-r/) **Team Hagerty Giveaway** We're giving away a box full of Hagerty swag to a member of Team Hagerty this week! Enter to win a hat, t-shirt, stickers and more by visiting the **[Team Hagerty Twitter](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pajrik-fuutjhhtj-y/)** page. For a chance to win, all you have to do is follow the Team Hagerty account, retweet [**THIS**](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pajrik-fuutjhhtj-j/) post with a comment using #TeamHagerty #Giveaway #TNSen and stay on the lookout for the winner. The giveaway runs until Friday and the winner will be announced Monday, May 25. For the competition rules, click **[HERE.](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pajrik-fuutjhhtj-t/)** **Bill's Blueprint To Hold China Accountable** Last week, Bill released his latest in a series of policy plans: **[Bill's Blueprint To Hold China Accountable](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pajrik-fuutjhhtj-i/)**. The Communist Chinese regime has an ongoing history of engaging in predatory business, military and diplomatic practices that endanger the United States and the rest of the world. As the U.S. Ambassador to Japan, Bill witnessed first hand the threat that they posed. Now, the regime has unleashed and attempted to cover up a deadly virus that has caused great devastation to the physical and economic health of the entire globe. As our next Senator, Bill will continue working closely with President Trump as we prioritize holding China responsible for the greatest cover-up in human history and for their continued efforts to undermine our infrastructure and democracy. Read the full plan **[HERE.](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pajrik-fuutjhhtj-d/)** **Read: Bill's Op-Ed In Townhall**Bill's latest editorial, released in Townhall yesterday, calls for the Communist Chinese regime to be held accountable for their attempt to cover-up and hide valuable information related to the Wuhan coronavirus. Communist China poses an existential threat to the United States and for too long, they have been allowed to use predatory practices against the global community. Read Bill's most recent op-ed **[HERE](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pajrik-fuutjhhtj-h/)**. [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pajrik-fuutjhhtj-k/) **Hagerty On One American News Network** Bill joined OANN last week to give an update on President Trump's Great American Economic Revival Industry Groups and discuss the importance of returning our supply chains to America. Click above to watch the full interview.
## **Be A Part Of #TeamHagerty**
[TELL US WHY YOU SUPPORT BILL HAGERTY](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pajrik-fuutjhhtj-u/) [DONATE TO THE CAMPAIGN](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pajrik-fuutjhhtj-m/) [VOLUNTEER WITH #TEAMHAGERTY](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pajrik-fuutjhhtj-c/)
## **Press Highlights**
**[TN Star:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pajrik-fuutjhhtj-q/) **Bill Hagerty: China Operates More Like Trade Enemy Than All**[OANN:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pajrik-fuutjhhtj-a/) **Pandemic Exposes Reliance On China In U.S. Supply Chain**[TN Star:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pajrik-fuutjhhtj-f/) **Bill Hagerty Releases Video Critical of the World Health Organization[**Fox Business:**](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pajrik-fuutjhhtj-z/) China operating more like trade enemy than trade ally: Bill Hagerty, Andy Puzder[**TN Star:**](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pajrik-fuutjhhtj-v/) Bill Hagerty Releases New Video Highlighting Relationship Between Joe Biden Family and China
## **What They're Saying...**
> _"__Tennessee loving Bill Hagerty, who was my Tennessee Victory Chair and is now the very outstanding Ambassador to Japan, will be running for the U.S. Senate. He is strong on crime, borders & our 2nd A. Loves our Military & our Vets. Has my Complete & Total Endorsement!"_
> [-President Donald Trump](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pajrik-fuutjhhtj-e/) _" Bill was on the Trump train before it was politically expedient. My father trusts him, he believes in him. For my father to have endorsed Bill Hagerty early in a primary, tells you all you need to know about the man."_
> [-Donald Trump Jr.](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pajrik-fuutjhhtj-s/)_" We need leaders like that on the floor of the U.S. Senate because frankly, the next couple of years are going to be about the Great American Come Back. The Great American Revial. That's why we need Bill Hagerty."_
> [-Larry Kudlow](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pajrik-fuutjhhtj-g/) _" I know that Bill Hagerty is a good quality Republican. He knows the value of conservative judges and is going to fight to support President Donald Trump. The President and I will continue to come back and support Bill Hagerty."_
> [-Nikki Haley](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pajrik-fuutjhhtj-w/) _" Let me take a moment to say what a blessing it is to have someone like Bill Hagerty. He is not only my friend but he's done a great job...as the Ambassador to Japan. But not only that, he is a huge supporter of law enforcement. I can't tell you how much he's helped me personally and...in Putnam County."_
> [-Eddie Farris, Sheriff](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pajrik-fuutjhhtj-yd/) _" You may have questions about who to vote for and who to get out and elect this campaign season, and I want you to know where I stand. I stand with Bill Hagerty because of the fine values he has and he supports our President Donald J Trump. I ask for you to get out there and support Bill Hagerty and his campaign."_
> [-Mayor Robby Hatcher](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pajrik-fuutjhhtj-yh/)
| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pajrik-fuutjhhtj-yk/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pajrik-fuutjhhtj-yu/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pajrik-fuutjhhtj-jl/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pajrik-fuutjhhtj-jr/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pajrik-fuutjhhtj-jy/)
---|---|---|---|---
Team Hagerty
P.O. Box 150748
Nashville, TN 37215

We recently met with the President in his office and set five membership certificates on his desk for approval.

Originally we were planning on releasing just one design, but when President Trump saw the designs on his desk, he said, “Can we reach out to the America People for some input? They always know what to do.”

When you become a Trump Executive Member, your certificate will be personalized with your name and it will even be SIGNED by President Trump himself.

Americans from all across the Nation can proudly display their certificates as a sign of their unwavering support for OUR President, and President Trump is trusting YOU to select the best one.

We’re sending the President the results first thing TOMORROW morning, and we know he’s going to ask which one you voted for. Don’t let him down.

Please vote for your favorite certificate below by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to make sure President Trump sees your vote.

DO YOU STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP?

Given the fact that you’ve yet to officially take a stand for President Trump, we worry that your support lies elsewhere. We wanted to give you another chance to show President Trump that you’re still with him, and we know he’s eagerly waiting for your response.

We’re going to send him your response IMMEDIATELY so he can finally know where you stand.
So do you stand with your President?

We’re going to send him your response IMMEDIATELY so he can finally know where you stand. So do you stand with your President? YES, OF COURSE NO Thank you, Team Trump 2020 Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J. Trump for President, Inc. and the Republican National Committee.

subject: 58 Veterans Endorse Claire Chase for Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Claire Chase for Congress, Inc
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE DATE: May 20, 2020 CONTACT: Mike Berg PHONE: (614) 678-1909 EMAIL: [mike@clairechase.org](mailto:mike@clairechase.org)
---
| 58 Veterans Endorse Claire Chase for Congress
ROSWELL, NM - Today the Claire Chase for Congress campaign is pleased to announce 58 Veterans have joined its new "Veterans for Claire" coalition.
Brigadier General Jack Fox (USA, Ret.), Chairman, Veterans for Claire, said, "I have a special and long-time knowledge of Claire and her family. She was one of my cadets as Commandant, New Mexico Military Institute many years ago. I have watched Claire grow and mature into a wonderful next-generation leader, more than up to the challenge of making America and New Mexico great again as your Representative in Congress."
Claire Chase is a third-generation military family member and a graduate of the New Mexico Military Institute. Her grandfather Col. James Manatt was Commander, Holloman AFB, her father James Manatt, Jr was a Vietnam era Military Intelligence officer and her brothers, Ben and Robert, are combat Veterans.
Claire Chase said, "I'm honored to have the endorsement of every single Veteran who has joined our coalition. These heroes' lives of service inspire me and fighting for them will be one of my top priorities in Congress."
To join the Veterans for Claire coalition click [here](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NCKuhMYI1dYgzmtOlZOYMxKo_FYa2UASpxBqUrcKLtFi-r_mIN_ewejrOBAOLkyS8mGjHe6GnmRG_wzar0Ofi61XhhOYgEE0u9UMgBp3OCh67Jl2MMR4JQcNZXcxQs3aWp43kbQlzqqjTv9yeVoTMOw5hyA4IL40khXWo75quZs=&c=pPzm2DI_v_FPI9hcPohGByy1QRNwTsWxIjm-2vk3wN_CasboY3WoqQ==&ch=C6G_vRngpVDCsbG1yztwJeeubdrSGo6ZuDNRocPv69jd7QNJmJPFXA==).

There is a lot that goes into a handwritten postcard campaign and your support will be critical to fulfilling this part of our campaign.

**Perdue (R): 45**
**Tomlinson (D): 44**
_Civiqs/Daily Kos, May 16-18_

Friend, we’ve been telling you all along that Georgia is THE Senate battleground in 2020.

**A new poll out yesterday shows Teresa Tomlinson and David Perdue in a statistical tie.**

National Democrats have not invested in our race, while conservative Super PACs have come after Teresa personally — and they’re prepared to spend whatever it takes to keep Mitch McConnell’s Senate majority.

clean_body: It's been inspiring to watch their leadership at work, but I can't help but look ahead to November on their behalf. There's a lot of work to do to secure another win in 2020, and it will only be possible with YOUR help. Friend, Despite unprecedented challenges, I've seen firsthand how the President and his allies in the Senate have remained steadfast in protecting the America First Agenda that YOU voted for in 2016. It's been inspiring to watch their leadership at work, but I can't help but look ahead to November on their behalf. There's a lot of work to do to secure another win in 2020, and it will only be possible with YOUR help. == I'll be honest with you - the Senate Majority is slipping through our fingers ... Democrats vying for the Senate are extremely well-funded, especially in must-win states. They're breaking fundraising records by channeling their angry base's obsession with destroying everything the President and his Senate allies have worked to accomplished. Not to mention the liberal media that is working to undermine President Trump, his Senate allies, and ANYONE who supports them. President Trump and the Senate Majority need your help! == The Democrats, led by Chuck Schumer, are waiting for their chance to take back the Majority and enact their radical, big-government policies. While the stakes could not be any higher going into these elections this year, the groundwork we lay TODAY will make all the difference in November. == == == == We 're less than 200 days out from Election Day. With the help of patriots like you, we can give our Senate Republicans the support they need to fight back against the Democrats' efforts to pull off a blue wave. The time to join the fight is NOW. Thank you for stepping up. Sarah Huckabee Sanders == If you agree that President Trump and Republicans are MAKING AMERICA GREAT AGAIN, text MAGA to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! body:
Friend --
Our team needs your help to win this election in November. Nancy Pelosi has enlisted the help of her SuperPAC to dump millions of dollars across targeted districts throughout the country -- **during the middle of a pandemic no less**. And among those districts is Rodney Davis' seat!
We've called on you many times in the past, but these next few months are the most critical. With Nancy Pelosi's SuperPAC controlling the airwaves she is able to create her own false narrative about Rodney to sway voters to vote for her far left puppet Betsy Londrigan! **That is why we need your help to spread our message today to combat the far left 's lies about Rodney and this campaign**.
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NYQjH7NZo9IiSQzvXXoZoRqdcVyWYykkMk5JxfuWL-5KQQKMy0SKCyWd0LS2XE3z62vQPrJ7leNAy2H_xgcShI8HC-2lxeVu7KVL5bP8mQMmKnwd27E-uZ2bdxlPKzWk3V6ObhoGcGoagV03OuMvDsLEKbRAcK32zAfoxNyl_MZBc7rNu5WFGt_hW_J2nOwYHcuPZA1232IBjXCqtRoHDxuJQo38TY7b8tq4_zg2WnViQodKgQzTSrpKCdjybdq65fGun8SGl-Mjq5eeTZaOcnOGvSr3fYBDSk6tg2YAOWqkyMvzeL1gZzcAuyZCT1EuXuU9ujuj9Tm1_5GBby2WyKMj_vHd_1z8zKnyKf-OOa416AHuVHlDqMfzkXymJ37S5uiuTdbNjFUGi81yZOs4yQ==&c=0LgdkakWxNigYcy-K6zgrumtU8DCMg3QCeYuIyxEd86s-09KnmU_yA==&ch=pOIibTacQ5JVvd2S59WGrCWRtdJHk71zpUim9jf3S9bBqy04t4ES4Q==)

**Here is the truth about Rodney Davis:** he is a leader in Congress who has fought for this district since from the very first day he took office. In Washington, he has worked to find innovative and longer term solutions to the problems we all face. Since the coronavirus pandemic began, Rodney diverted his attention to fully focus on making sure Americans had the resources they needed by working with local community leaders.
Betsy Londrigan, on the hand, continues to side with Pelosi in organizing political attacks in hopes of winning this race. After narrowly losing this seat in 2018, **Londrigan is willing to do anything to win this seat!**
Friend, Rodney Davis is counting on you to help out. clean_body: Friend -- Our team needs your help to win this election in November. Nancy Pelosi has enlisted the help of her SuperPAC to dump millions of dollars across targeted districts throughout the country -- during the middle of a pandemic no less. And among those districts is Rodney Davis' seat! We've called on you many times in the past, but these next few months are the most critical. With Nancy Pelosi's SuperPAC controlling the airwaves she is able to create her own false narrative about Rodney to sway voters to vote for her far left puppet Betsy Londrigan! That is why we need your help to spread our message today to combat the far left 's lies about Rodney and this campaign. == == Here is the truth about Rodney Davis: he is a leader in Congress who has fought for this district since from the very first day he took office. In Washington, he has worked to find innovative and longer term solutions to the problems we all face. Since the coronavirus pandemic began, Rodney diverted his attention to fully focus on making sure Americans had the resources they needed by working with local community leaders. Betsy Londrigan, on the hand, continues to side with Pelosi in organizing political attacks in hopes of winning this race. After narrowly losing this seat in 2018, Londrigan is willing to do anything to win this seat! Friend, Rodney Davis is counting on you to help out. == == == == == == == == Thank you, Matt Campaign Manager Rodney for Congress Downstate Illinois is the #1 target for Democrats this year, can we count on you to rush in $15, $10, $5, or even $1, to help Rodney win this race? **== ==** Paid for and authorized by Rodney for Congress == PO BOX 344 Taylorville, IL 62568 This message reflects the opinions and representations of the Rodney for Congress. body:
Chuck Schumer is doing whatever it takes to make sure Democrats come out victorious this November. His handpicked candidates are outraising top Republicans in key battleground states, liberal Super PACS are spending MILLIONS on attack ads, and Democrats continue to break fundraising records again and again.
Friend,

Chuck Schumer is doing whatever it takes to make sure Democrats come out victorious this November. His handpicked candidates are outraising top Republicans in key battleground states, liberal Super PACS are spending MILLIONS on attack ads, and Democrats continue to break fundraising records again and again.

**Republicans are being outraised, and it 's not just happening here in Arizona-- _It 's happening all across this country, and I've had enough of it._**

It's time Republicans step up and fight back against Schumer's attempts to buy the Senate Majority outright. That starts with ensuring Senators, like my good friend, Joni Ernst in Iowa, have the resources needed to push back against these endless attacks from Schumer and the Dark Money Dems.

I'm reaching out today to ask you an important question. _**Will you pitch in $25, $50, $75 or ANY amount to help Joni Ernst fight back against Chuck Schumer and the threat of a Democratic Senate Majority?**_

subject: good news and bad news

body:

|

| | **Here 's the good news, Peter:** MJ is in a great place to win the runoff and carry her momentum into the general election to beat Sen. Cornyn. We had our best quarter yet thanks to this team, and that's helped propel us forward these last two months -- even despite suspending our in-person events.

**This team has been incredible, and we wouldn 't be here without y'all. [Let's keep up that good work!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890042/7f51f7bc/4e68431e/4ef6bba7/3470033244/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0MjcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoff?refcode=email_20200520.1nd__1427__&amount=10")**

**But here 's what's worrying us:** Sen. If we're going to have the resources to fight back after we win the nomination, we're going to need your help NOW to be ready.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20LaTurner?=
subject: Another Watkins Scandal...
disclaimer_text: paid for by YOU, the taxpayer
body:
😠 | |
---
| | | Patriot,

It's happened again. Kansans keep learning more and more unbelievable truths about Congressman Steve Watkins. The latest report just might be the worst yet. Steve Watkins diverted taxpayer money intended to inform seniors about Coronavirus relief and used it to promote his campaign. It's hard to believe, but here's [the news](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=dfc75a3709&e=1050d051da) from the Topeka Capital-Journal.
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=7945f73f82&e=1050d051da)
---
|
_**The radio ads Steve Watkins has been running were paid for by YOU, the taxpayer.**_ And to be clear, never before in the history of our state has any Member of Congress used YOUR money to pay for radio ads, much less to divert money intended for information on a global pandemic to promote his re-election. Here's a sample of what Watkins used YOUR money to say about himself. _“He’s (Watkins) a true conservative,” the man says._
---
| Let us be crystal clear about what is happening here. We are in the middle of a global pandemic. Nearly 100,000 Americans have lost their lives. Our rural hospitals, doctors, and patients are seeing their budgets cut and Congressman Watkins took even more of YOUR money and instead of helping inform Kansas senior citizens how to stay safe from Coronavirus, he increased his budget to buy radio ads **self-congratulating himself. **

Because this is an election year, there are federal guidelines that make it illegal for a congressman to use their official office to promote themselves past May 6th. Because of the pandemic we are currently dealing with, **_Nancy Pelosi granted special permission_** to House members to continue running ads paid for by taxpayers ONLY if they are related health and safety issues related to Coronavirus.

But that's not what Watkins is doing,_** he's abusing taxpayer money to promote himself in blatantly political ads.**_

We need a congressman who understands and respects the rule of law, who respects your wallet, and doesn't agree with Nancy Pelosi that this pandemic presents an opportunity. Jake LaTurner is the man for the job. Jake will represent us well in Congress and we need your help to get him there, but instead of using taxpayer money, he's asking for your support today. [Your donation of $100, $50, or even $20](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=68133e0257&e=1050d051da) will help put a congressman in office who will fight for us with the honesty and integrity any elected official should.
---
| Yours in the fight,

Team LaTurner
---
| [Help us Drain the Swamp](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=c3fab441f7&e=1050d051da "Help us Drain the Swamp")
---
| | Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
---
| | | | | | | | [](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=b67c3628aa&e=1050d051da)
---
| | [](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=701ebc3bcb&e=1050d051da)
---
| | [](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=c1dd3d9c5e&e=1050d051da)
---
| | [](jakelaturner.com)
---

P.O. Box 67237
Topeka, KS 66667

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/profile?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=a58a1fbbbe&e=1050d051da) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=a58a1fbbbe&e=1050d051da&c=b896f23d27).

body:

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dani=20Brzozowski?=
subject: An exciting endorsement! 🚨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dani for Illinois
body:
I have some exciting news to share with you! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/a7a18faecf95/an-exciting-endorsement?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
I am thrilled to let you know that**I have been endorsed by Planned Parenthood!** This is an exciting day for our campaign, and I wanted to make sure that I let all of my supporters and friends know right away.

**As a proud feminist, the issue of reproductive choice and access to safe and legal abortions means so much to me.** Planned Parenthood has been helping to lead the fight to not only protect reproductive rights but to provide quality and affordable reproductive healthcare to everyone. Having their support in this race means so much to me.

My opponent, Adam Kinzinger, has voted to defund Planned Parenthood every single chance he's gotten. He's an anti-choice, pro-Trump conservative, and his positions on reproductive healthcare are dangerous for women everywhere. **Planned Parenthood knows that my opponent is dangerous, and they know they can count on me to be a champion for reproductive healthcare in Congress.**

Planned Parenthood also knows that I can win this race. They know that this campaign is worth supporting and worth investing in. The reason they know this campaign has momentum is because of you. I can't thank you enough for the support you have shown me during this campaign. We'll continue to make waves and take big steps towards winning this race because of you and your support.

Dani Brzozowski
Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16
---

Thank you,

_Georgette_

name: Amanda Makki
subject: Amanda Makki Prospectus on State FL-13 Race
body:
| [](https://makki.nationbuilder.com/r?u=GcXJViS5uWLVlPDTVbxjZBuEHV2l8c1zFzQ6Ttq0pvc-i-djeNLkBwI5Ws0oa0CX8GtVK3UMCqyQPjt-w_Vl_c5Yh-jJ0JVfh0mTcWZEtry3cZYpxFuUV-7y1OgwW7GXjpmVqBd8zQ0__-mtX71FX1aK9yNvu3HU7uSGPWmFl-hl5c29sGVGhkDPpP9q5KjHp3GBSG3uVEaRANBrjI_0ag&e=da3fb8759f1ee785466d5ec52a54a2bd&utm_source=makki&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=welcome_webinar_list&n=1) Good afternoon, We hope everyone is doing well and ready to start campaigning for President Trump and our August House Primary race for Charlie Crist's seat in FL-13. We have put together a prospectus of Amanda Makki and her powerful campaign for this House race that will be one of the top races in the country! For those of you who have not met Amanda, she is a solid, "American Dream" conservative who is prepared to win, to be our voice and represent our interests starting from day one. Please click below to learn more about our campaign.
### [Prospectus](https://makki.nationbuilder.com/r?u=GcXJViS5uWLVlPDTVbxjZBuEHV2l8c1zFzQ6Ttq0pvc-i-djeNLkBwI5Ws0oa0CX8GtVK3UMCqyQPjt-w_Vl_c5Yh-jJ0JVfh0mTcWZEtry3cZYpxFuUV-7y1OgwW7GXjpmVqBd8zQ0__-mtX71FX1aK9yNvu3HU7uSGPWmFl-hl5c29sGVGhkDPpP9q5KjHp3GBSG3uVEaRANBrjI_0ag&e=da3fb8759f1ee785466d5ec52a54a2bd&utm_source=makki&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=welcome_webinar_list&n=2)
How you can help us beat Charlie Crist! -Sign onto our email list for regular campaign updates. -Contribute to Amanda’s dominating war chest that is capable of driving her campaign to ultimate victory. -Join our team and volunteer to knock on your neighbors’ doors, wave signs and get our yard signs out in the community! Amanda wants to hear from you! Reach out to her with your ideas, needs and questions. We can use your insights and energies right now so we can beat Charlie in November! name: Laura Loomer
subject: OUTRAGE: Congress is giving money to illegal aliens!
body:
House Democrats recently passed the HEROES Act. There’s nothing heroic about it and it’s the THIRD stimulus bill cobbled together by Democrats.
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-376525-886380-5006495-0bd00e3cb9-30fbb1f82e)
Patriot,

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-376525-886380-5006494-81a45c54ed-30fbb1f82e) House Democrats recently passed the HEROES Act. There’s nothing heroic about it and it’s the THIRD stimulus bill cobbled together by Democrats.

This so called "stimulus package" was supposed to provide financial assistance to first responders and American citizens who are experiencing hardships due to the Chinese virus.

It’s a shameful bill that fulfills the socialist dreams that Democrats have been having for years!

First, it extends the $600 per week unemployment benefits until January of 2021. While Americans have been hit hard by unemployment, let me tell you the harm of this move.

One vendor we work with for the campaign was forced to lay off 21 of their employees at the beginning of the Coronavirus closures.

Six weeks later, this small business owner received a loan to reopen his business, and guess what? Many of his employees told him, “I’m making more money now than I was when I worked for you. I can’t come back!”

And now with Democrats attempting to extend those lofty unemployment benefits, small businesses around the nation will have problems hiring – despite nearly record-high unemployment!

And who is paying for that? Me and you!

**My opponent “Lazy” Lois Frankel was one of the biggest supporters of this unheroic bill.**

[**Help me send her packing by supporting my campaign.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-376525-886380-5006494-81a45c54ed-30fbb1f82e)

Ohhh, but wait, it gets even more ridiculous.

Remember that drum beat of student loan forgiveness that the Democrats running for president were strumming during their debates?

Yep, they threw that into the HEROES Act.

Democrats are even stepping closer to a Universal Basic Income by voting for a SECOND stimulus check!

But the most EGREGIOUS content of the HEROES ACT is this: **Stimulus checks to illegal aliens!**

Millions of illegal aliens are on company payrolls around America. They were not eligible for the $1,200 stimulus check issued in April because . . . THEY’RE NOT UNITED STATES CITIZENS!

But with the Democrats’ new bill, illegal aliens will not only get the SECOND stimulus check, they’ll get “back pay” and receive the first $1,200 as well!

It is literally unbelievable that in such a short amount of time, Congress has moved toward free income not just for American citizens – but for illegal aliens!

This madness has to stop.

You know I’m a fighter and you know that if I were in Congress right now, I would be raising hell to stop this legislation before it ever saw the light of day.

[**Help me win this by chipping into my campaign now.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-376525-886380-5006494-81a45c54ed-30fbb1f82e)

We have another $32,000 we need to raise before the end of May. There’s no better reason to give than to [help me defeat the “hero” of the dishonorable HEROES Act – “Lazy” Lois Frankel](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-376525-886380-5006494-81a45c54ed-30fbb1f82e).

Thank you so much for all that you do!

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.
---

720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/unsubscribe/2-561017072-4395-376525-886380-84585d41bbe610b-30fbb1f82e)

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: The Covid-19 Deregulation
body:
In the coming recovery, “deregulation will help the country get back on its feet.” | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3673ca6bde&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **The Covid-19 Deregulation**

“The Trump Administration’s long parade of deregulation—on everything from Title IX, to net neutrality, to environmental-impact statements, to joint employers—is among its biggest achievements. Amid the coronavirus pandemic, this work has thankfully continued,” _The Wall Street Journal_ editorial board writes.

Yesterday, President Trump took another big step with “an executive order telling government agencies to ‘combat the economic consequences of COVID-19 with the same vigor and resourcefulness with which the fight against COVID-19 itself has been waged.’”

In the coming recovery, “deregulation will help the country get back on its feet.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=817c525c07&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “With precautions such as social distancing, mask-wearing, and testing, our communities will begin a gradual and safe transition to reopening. As this happens, President Trump and his economic team will not repeat the policy mistakes of past Administrations,” Commerce Secretary Wilbur Ross writes for [Fox Business](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d1d2567018&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| The Trump Administration is “closely monitoring airline practices regarding refunds . . . Providing refunds is a long-standing practice when air travel has been disrupted on a large scale such as after the Sept. 11, 2001 attacks, Hurricane Katrina, and presidentially-declared natural disasters,” Transportation Secretary Elaine Chao writes in [_USA Today_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b1f7a4825c&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “It is outrageous to expect taxpayers to continue supporting an international body which acts as a lapdog for Beijing. If the WHO wants to change course and return to its original remit of serious global health protection, it can do so. If not, as Trump indicated in his letter to the body, the WHO should lose all U.S. funding,” the _[Washington Examiner](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=989bf67e9a&e=3ee4985eea)_ editorial board writes.
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7dcc5b44ca&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6899e0b532&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=02a422de09)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

This is game changing news: **Yesterday a federal judge ruled that all Texans --_regardless of age_ \-- now qualify to vote by mail.**

This is a huge victory for voting rights, and if the ruling is upheld, it will ensure that no Texan is forced to sit out what is likely to be the most consequential election of our time.

**However, state proponents of voter suppression have already vowed that they will not stop until they see this ruling overturned.**

[**We need all hands on deck for this, team. If you believe every Texan has the right to vote by mail this fall, sign your name to our petition now. name: Dick Durbin
subject: Three Senate seats that we can flip from red to blue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
_We hope that you are keeping safe during this pandemic, Peter. We know this is a difficult time for many, so please only contribute if you are able to do so. We are more committed than ever to a Democratic victory in November and are grateful you 're in this fight._

Peter,
Thank you for continuing to stand with me in the fight to take back the Senate this fall.
Today, I want to tell you about candidates in three races that are key to winning this fight.
The latest analysis from the experts show that Democrats have a shot at winning control of the Senate in November -- and that we can do it by flipping GOP-held Senate seats in now purple states where President Trump won in 2016, including Montana, North Carolina, and Texas.
Voters in these states have had enough of the hyperpartisanship and dysfunction in Washington -- and they are ready to elect leaders who will truly stand with them and fight for their values.
Our Democratic candidates can win these races -- but it's going to take all of us working as hard as we can now through November to support their campaigns and get their messages out.
**[We can only win this fight if we stand together. Here's my ask, Peter: will you split a $5 contribution now to back Steve Bullock in Montana, Cal Cunningham in North Carolina, MJ Hegar in Texas, and my re-election campaign here in Illinois?](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-senate-slate-2-may-2020?refcode=em200519i&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
In Montana, the popular Democratic Governor Steve Bullock is running to flip a red seat blue. The latest poll shows him ahead -- and if anyone can win in Montana, it's Steve Bullock.
A North Carolina poll shows veteran and former state legislator Cal Cunningham leading the incumbent by seven points in what Vox calls one of "Democrats' biggest opportunities" in 2020.
And in Texas, MJ Hegar is fighting hard to flip this crucial state. In 2018, Texas voters very nearly elected a Democratic Senator -- and in 2020, our chances of victory are better than ever.
**[We need you in this fight to flip the Senate, Peter. Pitch in $5 now.](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-senate-slate-2-may-2020?refcode=em200519i&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
My best,
Dick Durbin

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-senate-slate-2-may-2020?refcode=em200519i&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

* * *
Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Should you want to unsubscribe, you can [click here](https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/m/45ff40fc/42ab3cf4/60a70621/135d2303/3620619433/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Join Senator Durbin in taking on powerful special interests on behalf of hard-working middle class families by [making a contribution to our campaign here.](https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/m/45ff40fc/42ab3cf4/60a70621/135d2304/3620619433/VEsD/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/durbin_footer")
Friends of Dick Durbin
Attn: Online Department
101 W. Grand, Suite 200
Chicago, IL 60654

name: Republican Media Alerts
subject: Is this the best that Democrats can offer?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CORY GARDNER FOR SENATE
body:
Check out this clip of failed presidential candidate John Hickenlooper "answering" questions during the virtual Colorado Democratic forum last week.

_Cory Gardner is a fifth generation Coloradan whose 2014 Senate victory was a watershed moment on behalf of Republicans nationwide. Cory 's win proved that similar to the rest of the country, Coloradans were fed up with the Democrats' empty promises. And in the last six years, Cory has tirelessly fought to uplift his fellow Americans through pro-growth policies and common-sense legislating.

And this year, Cory is facing another critical Battleground Election. National Democrats are investing millions in Colorado to flip the Senate from red to blue._
---
Friend, check out this clip of failed presidential candidate John Hickenlooper "answering" questions during the virtual Colorado Democratic forum last week:

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gS0GzMkRawY4qjfPnH-Xg6RVsJbOuUVjk4fvSrUPEYy3_qRmzykoZJlAJj12s_yUE8mpqMYU_isIXjmSiaIqrll13i9d-Ds-rEo9tq0xOTqzTnqiltOlSwQhEdJQsEJjHvQdtv6jIiFM_A-I9LJI1picu1Hf0bKCcqh19_NjBrGR6MW6SRGXJ50h4R8anOlC4J_QLdz-4Gq57DC01TN7Sg==&c=xUNWqDmRl-JupeyetcYJfZFCzltq2Pz32HWsMZe8pRP3Ei2ivcsLGg==&ch=LbeNu03Zulu3lCgBfnnEfUZYPEHUudUvCY7rzG7kK4Qa1OYAcROqog==)
_(Make sure to finish reading this email after you watch so you can learn more about Chuck Schumer's hand-picked candidate)_

One Colorado news outlet even said, "**John Hickenlooper often struggles to put together a complete thought when he is questioned.** " _Is this truly the leadership that Chuck Schumer wants, or what the American people deserve?_

Real leadership is what Coloradans need right now, and with Cory Gardner, we can count on him to deliver that and so **much more.**
[**

name: Team Good
subject: Reporting back, team.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS
body:
As promised, we're writing back with the results of the survey we did earlier this month. Margaret knows one of the most critical parts of being a successful legislator is the ability to step back and listen to the people she serves: her constituents and her community—and then to be accountable to them on the issues that matter.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17566682/198727216/-940294256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjk1YzJkOC1kZDlhLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GOfjmlw96Izof1aYyyLTUZznGJQ2Ykv1kuFZl74fKLk=&emci=4c49dafe-019a-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=3695c2d8-dd9a-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=9814644) Team,

As promised, we're writing back with the results of the survey we did earlier this month. Margaret knows one of the most critical parts of being a successful legislator is the ability to step back and listen to the people she serves: her constituents and her community—and then to be accountable to them on the issues that matter.

The results from the feedback were emphatic and clear. The top three issues that Margaret's supporters care about are:
1. Healthcare
2. Clean water and clean air
3. Protecting Social Security and other social safety nets

These were followed closely by curbing gun violence and making the economy work for everyone.

These issues, as well as other issues you and your family care about, will continue to be the bedrock of Margaret's work when you send her to Washington to fight for us.

We also wanted to share a few thoughts supporters shared with us:

**Nancy knows we have to keep working to bring people together:**

_"Everything you listed is important to me. Bringing people together is critically important. The country's state of mind is too divisive. We need everyone to think about each other and not just 'me.' After that, everything can work."_

**Brian and Anne-Marie both agree that climate change and our environment have to come first:**

_"Climate change: the existential threat to the planet!"

"I care about all of these issues (education, healthcare) but truly believe the most urgent is environmental. Plus, our entire state economy depends on tourism tied to our environment."_

**Strengthening our safety net and infrastructure are of utmost importance to Steven:**

_"I think we must strengthen our safety net programs at the state and local level given the depression we are currently experiencing. At the state level, the Republican legislature has paid little attention to infrastructure across government as the failures at Public Health and Labor so clearly demonstrate. The electorate needs to understand that these are the actions of a do-nothing Republican legislature."_

**Cynthia Leigh believes we have to put access to affordable healthcare front and center:**

_"I retired early and had to pay for health insurance on my own. With Medicare, the yearly premiums and deductibles for hospitalization, doctor visits, and drugs are less than $5,000 annually, or 70% less than before. Access to affordable health care should be available for all and not based on income or job."_

**And finally, Robert advocates for vote-by-mail options for all:**

_"I am a Disabled Vietnam Veteran with PTSD, and I did not vote for some 10 years after I returned home. It's still difficult to be a part of such crowds, and especially now with COVID, we need to have vote-by-mail options for everyone."_

We thank everyone who participated in this survey, and as we continue to focus on grassroots change and building this movement, we will work to center these issues in our campaign.

**[If you want to ensure that Margaret can fight for working families in Florida, help ensure she gets to Congress by donating $25 today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17566683/198727217/788213855?refcode=em05202020&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjk1YzJkOC1kZDlhLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GOfjmlw96Izof1aYyyLTUZznGJQ2Ykv1kuFZl74fKLk=)**

Thank you for being part of our work— _good_ things are coming!

Team Good | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17566684/198727218/788213855?refcode=em05202020&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjk1YzJkOC1kZDlhLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GOfjmlw96Izof1aYyyLTUZznGJQ2Ykv1kuFZl74fKLk=)

| Margaret Good is a lawyer, runner, and state representative running in FL-16 to change the face of Southwest Florida, and we are so proud to have you on our team. Margaret is a strong voice for our values—she brings an incredible work ethic and common sense to her fight for working families, to protect Florida’s fragile environment, for accessible and affordable healthcare, and against the special interests that have hijacked our political process. _We need to send her to Congress to continue fighting for us._

Email is the best way for us to keep you informed about what’s happening with the campaign, and we are excited to have your support! You may notice that we send a lot of emails asking for your support—that’s because we win when everyone does what they can to help. If you’d like to volunteer, **[click here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17566686/198727220/192916899?contactdata=cb%2BT9%2Fy%2B%2FxrDz6seQX3c1iw9V%2BcEf3o6xt%2BL2ax01dq5SeDhXo3ImdVvuyH5ATqr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjk1YzJkOC1kZDlhLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GOfjmlw96Izof1aYyyLTUZznGJQ2Ykv1kuFZl74fKLk=&emci=4c49dafe-019a-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=3695c2d8-dd9a-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=9814644)**

body:

name: Lisa Scheller
subject: FW: Pennsylvania Yard Sign Victory Fund
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Scheller for Congress, Inc
body:
It’s Lisa and I’m reaching out quickly to see if you’ve chipped into our Pennsylvania Yard Sign Victory Fund yet? This fund was crafted by my team to Peter, It’s Lisa and I’m reaching out quickly to see if you’ve chipped into our Pennsylvania Yard Sign Victory Fund yet?
This fund was crafted by my team to ensure that our neighbors all across the Lehigh Valley are sure they know who to vote for come June 2nd.
We need to make sure that every voter who is teetering on the edge has the solidification that they need before they cast their ballot, and one of the best ways we can do this is through yard signs.
But Peter, as Alex mentioned below, we cannot do this unless we meet our minimum threshold to go back to the printer tomorrow. name: Kevin
subject: Washington Times - Race for Florida's 13th Congressional District becomes bellwether for national battle
body:
| Good Morning! Today, the _Washington Times_ printed the below article about the FL-13 race and highlighted Amanda Makki’s clear Frontrunner status with not only dollars raised, but also with over 20 current local Pinellas County leaders and National GOP leaders’ endorsements in this opinion piece: _Ms. Makki became the frontrunner in the 13th District primary after filing to run in June, scooping up $740,000 in contributions, far more than the other contenders. She has also racked far more endorsements than the others in the Aug. 18 GOP primary._ “ _Amanda’s life is the story of the American dream, and her commitment to our conservative principles, passion to serve and willingness to fight for what is right are exactly what the people of South Pinellas County are looking for in their next congressman,” said [House](https://makki.nationbuilder.com/r?u=GjwzQmjoNJNKZ7-eUAZR_AOiBvgimoL-pmPeBTCxyFuBfopP1FkWXPQS4kzma_ux&e=da3fb8759f1ee785466d5ec52a54a2bd&utm_source=makki&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=washington_times_piece&n=1) Minority Leader Kevin McCarthy, California Republican._ _Added Whip Steve Scalise, Louisiana Republican: “Amanda’s grit and determination are exactly what we need to keep fighting against the radical, socialist agenda pushed by [House](https://makki.nationbuilder.com/r?u=GjwzQmjoNJNKZ7-eUAZR_AOiBvgimoL-pmPeBTCxyFuBfopP1FkWXPQS4kzma_ux&e=da3fb8759f1ee785466d5ec52a54a2bd&utm_source=makki&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=washington_times_piece&n=2) Democrats. The constituents of this district deserve better than a Democrat who doesn’t represent their values — they deserve Amanda Makki.”_ Read the full article here: [https://www.washingtontimes.com/news/2020/may/19/florida-race-house-seat-becomes-bellwether-nationa/](https://makki.nationbuilder.com/r?u=GjwzQmjoNJNKZ7-eUAZR_AOiBvgimoL-pmPeBTCxyFuHgXlRxsP-SXZ8Ol69saVFfMqF13xk35H-RQm3G5oJnJ4vxl5YLzlcy9IcYOV7e6dsmrcIjtlK3AQWTmBFN4Xoe34yLhjj3gqP8jWOKgNtQQ&e=da3fb8759f1ee785466d5ec52a54a2bd&utm_source=makki&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=washington_times_piece&n=3) | [](https://makki.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYiVfdd1qpzfdWTEF9wN4yX0TnJpKjCrzruTy2m-Lt4caQpmuzI9NjbVlXjIwJcDH0oihQ1u0MWrH9x_dJxCyKFgTKpo-e41s_ktZ7MMkQ1ZM&e=da3fb8759f1ee785466d5ec52a54a2bd&utm_source=makki&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=washington_times_piece&n=4 "Donate") [Donate](https://makki.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYiVfdd1qpzfdWTEF9wN4yX0TnJpKjCrzruTy2m-Lt4caQpmuzI9NjbVlXjIwJcDH0oihQ1u0MWrH9x_dJxCyKFgTKpo-e41s_ktZ7MMkQ1ZM&e=da3fb8759f1ee785466d5ec52a54a2bd&utm_source=makki&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=washington_times_piece&n=5)
---
Warmest regards,
Kevin Hofmann
Finance Director, Amanda Makki for Congress
-=-=-
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://makki.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=da3fb8759f1ee785466d5ec52a54a2bd&utm_source=makki&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=washington_times_piece&n=6). -=-=-

name: John Cornyn
subject: Friend, have you seen the news?
body:
Friend, I'm getting frustrated.
Every time I turn on my computer and read through the news, I keep seeing very troubling headlines about the Senate Majority.
Ever since Chuck Schumer and Nancy Pelosi started making calls to their big-dollar Hollywood donors, there's no doubt that they've been dangling the Senate Majority as their big prize.
Well, Friend, it looks like the mainstream media has taken to the Far-Left's narrative. They really think they can flip the Senate. name: Marco Rubio
subject: Fox News reports: Planned Parenthood improperly applied for and received $80 million in funds
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
Planned Parenthood affiliates are not eligible for the Paycheck Protection Program. Period.
**FOX NEWS: Planned Parenthood affiliates improperly applied for, received $80 million in coronavirus stimulus funds, feds say**

Friend, this is infuriating.

Planned Parenthood affiliates are not eligible for the Paycheck Protection Program. Period. With a parent organization that possesses nearly half a BILLION DOLLARS in assets, their application and acquisition of these funds is an absolute violation of the PPP guidelines.

This cannot go without consequences. PPP loans were created in a state of emergency to bring relief to the Main Street businesses that need it most, not multi-million dollar, liberal-funded mega-organizations such as Planned Parenthood.
[**TELL PLANNED PARENTHOOD TO GIVE IT BACK: ADD YOUR NAME**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ABMbugbswUvCmnq4JxDlKrTrusutNAPTsTxcmZavhv7Iqt_XYOdmUJH9D6edM0c-qOY-I6fik0fT89tMK8hJpBqXNQg_uV27FHlu-mKAc5IOdlA5AiGARfkEGi-qW37HX2fvCuMHLQUS_NUvRnxckscQgsPBQ9Turu8xmBFdqWldGckRVHkeNvE1zolxzEhMMyAhUT79a7-4z1zieOwxEaSE0O4fOS5cN4xlj28MUaytWp9cPn-Mpfql1M8ytLnjs6K63vph0yaU3y6FAvztTym2HV-_2lOMEU5uRPI_o-ao-MjikikkA-_jb3xufTMnxcZ647JxC4861yalvZp_SOv2M7S_qG_n6iiNRZ--sgVQuRJmnbpAVQ==&c=C5HePH28FCgnHK6VxmLFt2P-wV3Qe7mHhzcxJI4wIvMHXzIuQyPBqg==&ch=D8neldg7LNgTeocstz8Abvh0K-kapfvbuaAJUbRfH4J42GvwlHOVnQ==)

There is no way Planned Parenthood should have been able to get these loans in the first place. There needs to be an investigation into Planned Parenthood, the banks that issued these loans, and even internally at the SBA. No stone can go unturned with such a gross abuse of funds in the midst of a global crisis.
[**TELL PLANNED PARENTHOOD: GIVE IT BACK! >>> ADD YOUR NAME**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ABMbugbswUvCmnq4JxDlKrTrusutNAPTsTxcmZavhv7Iqt_XYOdmUJH9D6edM0c-qOY-I6fik0fT89tMK8hJpBqXNQg_uV27FHlu-mKAc5IOdlA5AiGARfkEGi-qW37HX2fvCuMHLQUS_NUvRnxckscQgsPBQ9Turu8xmBFdqWldGckRVHkeNvE1zolxzEhMMyAhUT79a7-4z1zieOwxEaSE0O4fOS5cN4xlj28MUaytWp9cPn-Mpfql1M8ytLnjs6K63vph0yaU3y6FAvztTym2HV-_2lOMEU5uRPI_o-ao-MjikikkA-_jb3xufTMnxcZ647JxC4861yalvZp_SOv2M7S_qG_n6iiNRZ--sgVQuRJmnbpAVQ==&c=C5HePH28FCgnHK6VxmLFt2P-wV3Qe7mHhzcxJI4wIvMHXzIuQyPBqg==&ch=D8neldg7LNgTeocstz8Abvh0K-kapfvbuaAJUbRfH4J42GvwlHOVnQ==)

My team and I have worked tirelessly to get as much relief to small businesses as possible. The Paycheck Protection Program has saved tens of millions of jobs. We are proud of what we have been able to accomplish, so I can't even begin to describe how infuriating it is to see that organizations such as Planned Parenthood take advantage of these funds at the expense of businesses and families across the country.

We aren't going to let this go Friend. We're going to ensure this never happens again and that those funds are returned. PPP loans are meant for small businesses and it is our job to make sure that's where it goes. When it doesn't, it's our job to fix it. [**Add your name to our petition and demand that Planned Parenthood returns the money NOW >>>**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ABMbugbswUvCmnq4JxDlKrTrusutNAPTsTxcmZavhv7Iqt_XYOdmUJH9D6edM0c-qOY-I6fik0fT89tMK8hJpBqXNQg_uV27FHlu-mKAc5IOdlA5AiGARfkEGi-qW37HX2fvCuMHLQUS_NUvRnxckscQgsPBQ9Turu8xmBFdqWldGckRVHkeNvE1zolxzEhMMyAhUT79a7-4z1zieOwxEaSE0O4fOS5cN4xlj28MUaytWp9cPn-Mpfql1M8ytLnjs6K63vph0yaU3y6FAvztTym2HV-_2lOMEU5uRPI_o-ao-MjikikkA-_jb3xufTMnxcZ647JxC4861yalvZp_SOv2M7S_qG_n6iiNRZ--sgVQuRJmnbpAVQ==&c=C5HePH28FCgnHK6VxmLFt2P-wV3Qe7mHhzcxJI4wIvMHXzIuQyPBqg==&ch=D8neldg7LNgTeocstz8Abvh0K-kapfvbuaAJUbRfH4J42GvwlHOVnQ==)

Thank you and stay safe,
Marco Rubio
[**TELL PLANNED PARENTHOOD: GIVE IT BACK! >>> ADD YOUR NAME**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ABMbugbswUvCmnq4JxDlKrTrusutNAPTsTxcmZavhv7Iqt_XYOdmUJH9D6edM0c-qOY-I6fik0fT89tMK8hJpBqXNQg_uV27FHlu-mKAc5IOdlA5AiGARfkEGi-qW37HX2fvCuMHLQUS_NUvRnxckscQgsPBQ9Turu8xmBFdqWldGckRVHkeNvE1zolxzEhMMyAhUT79a7-4z1zieOwxEaSE0O4fOS5cN4xlj28MUaytWp9cPn-Mpfql1M8ytLnjs6K63vph0yaU3y6FAvztTym2HV-_2lOMEU5uRPI_o-ao-MjikikkA-_jb3xufTMnxcZ647JxC4861yalvZp_SOv2M7S_qG_n6iiNRZ--sgVQuRJmnbpAVQ==&c=C5HePH28FCgnHK6VxmLFt2P-wV3Qe7mHhzcxJI4wIvMHXzIuQyPBqg==&ch=D8neldg7LNgTeocstz8Abvh0K-kapfvbuaAJUbRfH4J42GvwlHOVnQ==)

**

DOWN TO TWO CERTIFICATES! 1 HOUR LEFT TO VOTE!

Friend,

We’re about to launch our Official 2020 Trump Executive Membership program, but we need your help to finalize a few important decisions.

We recently met with the President in his office and set the membership certificates on his desk for approval.

Originally we were planning on releasing just one design, but when President Trump saw the designs on his desk, he said, “Can we reach out to the American People for some input? They always know what to do.”

When you become a Trump Executive Member, your certificate will be personalized with your name and it will even be SIGNED by President Trump himself.

Please cast your vote below to select your favorite certificate design for our brand new Official 2020 Trump Executive Membership program.

http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=b55612da48efbd7231a71a41bb37092074b8aa96a86827319bb3868de601d223fe07d32f39f3276f7b7ac6d53f07eab542b8fb5e68e1b19c

http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=b55612da48efbd72ebd5558f4222f97829fad473af15a01811e2bf1c7cfcaa7c3266e68d3c9798ec9fd9d766d783c9af67e012f175606d15

name: Washington Free Beacon
subject: Sign the National Petition to STOP Socialism in America
body:
[ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TiT9fHmMbe7ICx7l5rxePPGqgIFkVJngrYRxcCWSN_PoNV48d4OYiU6-lhzwCij3fsf_TX7wud4Sw2uPYE6qx1IHIdh0_-f38KfZoWJm9_fMXvu_4zbbSByMKCKIqKcIhNsY5nf29MzTJSeETuIO9TYwNwtxuz_QLl9-gnuwypdkbK0ClcuGR2es2MZgKdEEHcv8aTYv5aY=&c=0Kkxawt0QTwwR6FfwDTpamYyR9AiYwpG4haxcHHkKW8NHqxU_b7psw==&ch=Pv3R3OV75p05LtJUmQs7enpgZ5gKffG3hHuZ8sgwh395DBXPrwmEuA==) Dear fellow conservative, I don't need to tell you that **socialism never works**. But do you know who needs to hear that? Unfortunately, many folks legislating in our nation today. And unless we stand up to stop them, these radicals are bound and determined to run roughshod over timeless American ideals like the free market, limited government, and personal responsibility with their left-wing socialist vision for our nation! **[If you want to stand up and show radical leftists that the vast majority of Americans are smart enough to realize that socialism will only topple our government and our entire nation, please sign the National Petition to STOP Socialism today.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TiT9fHmMbe7ICx7l5rxePPGqgIFkVJngrYRxcCWSN_PoNV48d4OYiU6-lhzwCij3fsf_TX7wud4Sw2uPYE6qx1IHIdh0_-f38KfZoWJm9_fMXvu_4zbbSByMKCKIqKcIhNsY5nf29MzTJSeETuIO9TYwNwtxuz_QLl9-gnuwypdkbK0ClcuGR2es2MZgKdEEHcv8aTYv5aY=&c=0Kkxawt0QTwwR6FfwDTpamYyR9AiYwpG4haxcHHkKW8NHqxU_b7psw==&ch=Pv3R3OV75p05LtJUmQs7enpgZ5gKffG3hHuZ8sgwh395DBXPrwmEuA==)** [**Sign the Petition**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TiT9fHmMbe7ICx7l5rxePPGqgIFkVJngrYRxcCWSN_PoNV48d4OYiU6-lhzwCij3fsf_TX7wud4Sw2uPYE6qx1IHIdh0_-f38KfZoWJm9_fMXvu_4zbbSByMKCKIqKcIhNsY5nf29MzTJSeETuIO9TYwNwtxuz_QLl9-gnuwypdkbK0ClcuGR2es2MZgKdEEHcv8aTYv5aY=&c=0Kkxawt0QTwwR6FfwDTpamYyR9AiYwpG4haxcHHkKW8NHqxU_b7psw==&ch=Pv3R3OV75p05LtJUmQs7enpgZ5gKffG3hHuZ8sgwh395DBXPrwmEuA==) Extremists on the left are proposing extreme policies. Liberal legislators are pushing for medicare for all -- a single-payer, government-run health care system. They're claiming that the government should guarantee tuition and debt-free public colleges to all. Extremists want to **double** union membership. They want to cancel student loan debt. And they want to force our nation toward unsustainable environmental fantasies like the Green New Deal. **[To stand up against the failed policies of socialism, please sign the National Petition to STOP Socialism in America today.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TiT9fHmMbe7ICx7l5rxePPGqgIFkVJngrYRxcCWSN_PoNV48d4OYiU6-lhzwCij3fsf_TX7wud4Sw2uPYE6qx1IHIdh0_-f38KfZoWJm9_fMXvu_4zbbSByMKCKIqKcIhNsY5nf29MzTJSeETuIO9TYwNwtxuz_QLl9-gnuwypdkbK0ClcuGR2es2MZgKdEEHcv8aTYv5aY=&c=0Kkxawt0QTwwR6FfwDTpamYyR9AiYwpG4haxcHHkKW8NHqxU_b7psw==&ch=Pv3R3OV75p05LtJUmQs7enpgZ5gKffG3hHuZ8sgwh395DBXPrwmEuA==)** Given the amount of ignorance in our nation today, many don't even realize how many failed experiments our world has already seen with socialism. Maybe they were asleep during history class, but you and I certainly weren't -- heck, we've seen it play out! 2020 is a tipping point for our nation. **Either we'll remain the land of the free or we'll head down a dangerous path to socialism, destruction, and devastation for the nation we cherish.** **[Help me stand up against socialist policies in our nation by signing this national petition today.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TiT9fHmMbe7ICx7l5rxePPGqgIFkVJngrYRxcCWSN_PoNV48d4OYiU6-lhzwCij3fsf_TX7wud4Sw2uPYE6qx1IHIdh0_-f38KfZoWJm9_fMXvu_4zbbSByMKCKIqKcIhNsY5nf29MzTJSeETuIO9TYwNwtxuz_QLl9-gnuwypdkbK0ClcuGR2es2MZgKdEEHcv8aTYv5aY=&c=0Kkxawt0QTwwR6FfwDTpamYyR9AiYwpG4haxcHHkKW8NHqxU_b7psw==&ch=Pv3R3OV75p05LtJUmQs7enpgZ5gKffG3hHuZ8sgwh395DBXPrwmEuA==)** [**Sign the Petition**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TiT9fHmMbe7ICx7l5rxePPGqgIFkVJngrYRxcCWSN_PoNV48d4OYiU6-lhzwCij3fsf_TX7wud4Sw2uPYE6qx1IHIdh0_-f38KfZoWJm9_fMXvu_4zbbSByMKCKIqKcIhNsY5nf29MzTJSeETuIO9TYwNwtxuz_QLl9-gnuwypdkbK0ClcuGR2es2MZgKdEEHcv8aTYv5aY=&c=0Kkxawt0QTwwR6FfwDTpamYyR9AiYwpG4haxcHHkKW8NHqxU_b7psw==&ch=Pv3R3OV75p05LtJUmQs7enpgZ5gKffG3hHuZ8sgwh395DBXPrwmEuA==) Thanks for your time! Aaron Harison President Free Beacon

body:

Last week, Lizzie Fletcher and House Democrats proved once again that they represent the values of San Francisco, not Houston.

While millions are struggling with unemployment, including thousands here in Houston, Democrats passed a bill that would **send illegal immigrants up to $6,000 in taxpayer funded checks**. Instead of working with Republicans to support sectors like Houston's energy industry, Fletcher and Pelosi passed a $3 trillion grab bag of liberal policies.

That's why this morning we released a new advertisement highlighting Fletcher's support for Pelosi's left-wing agenda.

name: Team Steel Alerts
subject: We can’t back down now -- we need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress
body:
The Democrats won't give up this seat quietly -- Nancy Pelosi, Michael Bloomberg, dark money groups, and the Democrats fundraising machine are gearing up to do and spend whatever it takes to hold on to this seat and the House Majority.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010Q7jaWSU4_IqnNrTs03LYA9jUqJXOgc6Kcdg76uOZssl4F9VRA8VTok1eAdSjADxRvCs-iuXLxM7ARonVgruo4cghI5FBaIZR-pIDp5RUErSGbVYB7lACdODAFfbyJXk6dRyzMEP-DZgB2xCTtks4qzGRjTPxfEhTzDNvvsswqq88qV-qRzYgNLTGUBm76t7OAD3nf1Zgj43vUPgNPPEXXHn9L-D-7ardW7XMDHhRw_lfldBCOFdmH3KrrG9cUwjZNppVXQn3ZZFa2T4nVFyAkdczKpynfr_fGrlIDBstPdGxRt1eewB_sGMQOSBTltvfz7uK_u6UV0OD8VnzDuQvPA4vzZmCuoS6svckIG3rLxQIoxleQ0ik3ixXibXDrb7&c=F4VSjefsbgs1aKJ-AADEEaKoxblX8O4KW4Hr0XMXqWkF4nVOXVyccg==&ch=ccsiWfC0a6EH79NjtI7mmGWFvZeDIMriyT70NsIj610UbYvFCLT_PQ==) Friend, this fight isn't just about winning this seat. It's about returning conservative leadership to California, common-sense solutions to Washington, and putting an end to Left's socialist agenda _for good._

**If you want to see lower and fewer taxes, affordable healthcare, responsible government spending, and an end to the Green New Deal --[chip in whatever you can (even just $1) to help send Republican Michelle Steel to Congress!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010Q7jaWSU4_IqnNrTs03LYA9jUqJXOgc6Kcdg76uOZssl4F9VRA8VTtIKTw4SBJpNxGJOOsTOvee_W1QuYa0_LroTzWmKj2IAsMOBhHtwbblR5uA7sW9b9MTBvgpaGjvFJEA7ZHnRoNRo7n4Y5ZtGhn8f66OX5SqUGnB1KPaT6PVePu_9NdWif_ZzrRVd9KtcRylN7depNrZjp3xjk_Vv3azUtfMIjr9hnkfQpMn7wEHMNTuhoAHcvqtCkJdVXBX52Vk_QYgqClVSU4bSwql2n4eadD4upUFEIW9qsGv3ljn9bGPTN7-wmW8mj7LHlrd78jYVhG3Sub0mkwbCV_CQujJHkzgPxBjhcgSy7t2SMvCmf66oDX6q0Lz1R9LDSie0&c=F4VSjefsbgs1aKJ-AADEEaKoxblX8O4KW4Hr0XMXqWkF4nVOXVyccg==&ch=ccsiWfC0a6EH79NjtI7mmGWFvZeDIMriyT70NsIj610UbYvFCLT_PQ==)**

Michelle Steel is a lifelong conservative and proven tax-fighter -- she's returned $400 million to California taxpayers and tirelessly fought against higher taxes, to provide affordable housing, and promote a business friendly environment that creates jobs in our community.

But the Democrats won't give up this seat quietly -- Nancy Pelosi, Michael Bloomberg, dark money groups, and the Democrats' fundraising machine are gearing up to do and spend whatever it takes to hold on to this seat and the House Majority.

_Last week, a Pelosi aligned PAC announced millions in ads to be used to attack us.
Last quarter, our opponent outraised us by DOUBLE.
Last election, Michael Bloomberg spent $4.4+ million to buy this seat._

**That 's why we're coming to you, Friend. We're in the fight of our lives, because whoever wins this seat will win the House Majority. But we will not win without your support. [Can you chip in right now to take back the House for Republicans?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010Q7jaWSU4_IqnNrTs03LYA9jUqJXOgc6Kcdg76uOZssl4F9VRA8VTok1eAdSjADxRvCs-iuXLxM7ARonVgruo4cghI5FBaIZR-pIDp5RUErSGbVYB7lACdODAFfbyJXk6dRyzMEP-DZgB2xCTtks4qzGRjTPxfEhTzDNvvsswqq88qV-qRzYgNLTGUBm76t7OAD3nf1Zgj43vUPgNPPEXXHn9L-D-7ardW7XMDHhRw_lfldBCOFdmH3KrrG9cUwjZNppVXQn3ZZFa2T4nVFyAkdczKpynfr_fGrlIDBstPdGxRt1eewB_sGMQOSBTltvfz7uK_u6UV0OD8VnzDuQvPA4vzZmCuoS6svckIG3rLxQIoxleQ0ik3ixXibXDrb7&c=F4VSjefsbgs1aKJ-AADEEaKoxblX8O4KW4Hr0XMXqWkF4nVOXVyccg==&ch=ccsiWfC0a6EH79NjtI7mmGWFvZeDIMriyT70NsIj610UbYvFCLT_PQ==)**

This race is a toss-up and a top-target. The Democrats are throwing us everything they've got. It's up to us to stop their momentum and keep them from buying this seat _again_.

clean_body: The Democrats won't give up this seat quietly -- Nancy Pelosi, Michael Bloomberg, dark money groups, and the Democrats fundraising machine are gearing up to do and spend whatever it takes to hold on to this seat and the House Majority. == Friend, this fight isn't just about winning this seat. It's about returning conservative leadership to California, common-sense solutions to Washington, and putting an end to Left's socialist agenda for good. If you want to see lower and fewer taxes, affordable healthcare, responsible government spending, and an end to the Green New Deal --== Michelle Steel is a lifelong conservative and proven tax-fighter -- she's returned $400 million to California taxpayers and tirelessly fought against higher taxes, to provide affordable housing, and promote a business friendly environment that creates jobs in our community. But the Democrats won't give up this seat quietly -- Nancy Pelosi, Michael Bloomberg, dark money groups, and the Democrats' fundraising machine are gearing up to do and spend whatever it takes to hold on to this seat and the House Majority. Last week, a Pelosi aligned PAC announced millions in ads to be used to attack us. Last quarter, our opponent outraised us by DOUBLE. Last election, Michael Bloomberg spent $4.4+ million to buy this seat. That 's why we're coming to you, Friend. We're in the fight of our lives, because whoever wins this seat will win the House Majority. But we will not win without your support. == This race is a toss-up and a top-target. The Democrats are throwing us everything they've got. It's up to us to stop their momentum and keep them from buying this seat again. \-- Team Steel Alerts == | With so much uncertainty right now, we know not everyone will be able to contribute. But even if you're unable to chip in right now, we could still use your help. == Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress 8907 Warner Ave Suite 220 Huntington Beach, CA 92647 == | | Michelle Steel for Congress | 8907 Warner Ave Suite 220, Huntington Beach, CA 92647 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net in collaboration with |

name: Karl Rove
subject: Texas is next
body:
Friend, Senator Cornyn emailed you a few days ago about where our GOP Senate majority now stands. I just happened to come across his message again and thought I should email you with a quick update and with the bad news that our situation has become even more critical. We're holding onto a slim Senate majority just four seats and Liberals are closer than ever to flipping it. **FIRST** , their Far-Left challengers began OUTRAISING vulnerable GOP incumbents. **THEN** , liberal mega-donors like Mike Bloomberg and Hollywood celebrities joined in putting their big-money contributions behind Joe Biden. **NOW** , Biden has begun campaigning to flip the Senate almost as much as he's campaigning for president. He knows the only way to run the table on his left-wing agenda if he's president is to blow up the last line of conservative defense in Washington, namely the GOP Senate. The Far-Left is coming for our Senate majority, and they're working harder than ever. And now, with many of their efforts in other states looking good, they're coming for TEXAS. **[I'm counting on you to help keep Texas red and the Senate in GOP hands. Can you chip in $25 to our counter-efforts?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001UAp5v-zvkWMySxp4iHIpgGG8GS-EqJkouikBZ5ECBrjc3dmdbNGl0FPH6PcBwfGrw2xpRSrux-lkjlNyqUlyrI9Mqfo3qB6MDU3mGgSb9K0pCw2gUuMDsTJoGwsA_zpZ05Mc2AsjPUxy-UUm0Dwcx59tKigZoc2D8yIO41sV2yA2NBvEkoNJcYW955kT6H5dDfjKT3EGJz-oi7R1dy-8VK0awKBM4oF2nKWSRHRu2RVisjkjyOYHLtSpWT0JH9aFuRcbmSzYaCs08GoMT1bJL2JZQ__Q1KURBmbCs2n2tjJp_94zB-L6tGNki0d5ocro9tlg9HYfoI-IZHd8TQitEsBddmRG7MIK1rGR-GH4qIM=&c=Te7tBmN3jLRPEycTLYksRAzHm8u3zLu_20okiV_BQ86FGMmG1ERaGg==&ch=jvyps_FxrbYmQfdS9DOVTtDTKfUwf27Apd0-Kn_B2YAk0riz5o_uvw==)** _**#MajorityWatch**_ **Maine: OUTRAISED by Dems** **Colorado: OUTRAISED by Dems** **Arizona: OUTRAISED by Dems** **North Carolina: OUTRAISED by Dems** [**DEFEND THE MAJORITY**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001UAp5v-zvkWMySxp4iHIpgGG8GS-EqJkouikBZ5ECBrjc3dmdbNGl0FPH6PcBwfGrw2xpRSrux-lkjlNyqUlyrI9Mqfo3qB6MDU3mGgSb9K0pCw2gUuMDsTJoGwsA_zpZ05Mc2AsjPUxy-UUm0Dwcx59tKigZoc2D8yIO41sV2yA2NBvEkoNJcYW955kT6H5dDfjKT3EGJz-oi7R1dy-8VK0awKBM4oF2nKWSRHRu2RVisjkjyOYHLtSpWT0JH9aFuRcbmSzYaCs08GoMT1bJL2JZQ__Q1KURBmbCs2n2tjJp_94zB-L6tGNki0d5ocro9tlg9HYfoI-IZHd8TQitEsBddmRG7MIK-0wiAwRxOpo=&c=Te7tBmN3jLRPEycTLYksRAzHm8u3zLu_20okiV_BQ86FGMmG1ERaGg==&ch=jvyps_FxrbYmQfdS9DOVTtDTKfUwf27Apd0-Kn_B2YAk0riz5o_uvw==) I can promise you one thing, Friend. The Far-Left will do anything it takes to flip the Senate. They've begun to make inroads in other states, and I guarantee you ** _if we 're not careful, Texas is next._**

I'm counting on you to support John Cornyn's efforts to keep them in check to defend the Lone Star State and to defend our conservative Senate majority. **[Can you play a large part in our efforts by chipping in $25 immediately?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001UAp5v-zvkWMySxp4iHIpgGG8GS-EqJkouikBZ5ECBrjc3dmdbNGl0FPH6PcBwfGrw2xpRSrux-lkjlNyqUlyrI9Mqfo3qB6MDU3mGgSb9K0pCw2gUuMDsTJoGwsA_zpZ05Mc2AsjPUxy-UUm0Dwcx59tKigZoc2D8yIO41sV2yA2NBvEkoNJcYW955kT6H5dDfjKT3EGJz-oi7R1dy-8VK0awKBM4oF2nKWSRHRu2RVisjkjyOYHLtSpWT0JH9aFuRcbmSzYaCs08GoMT1bJL2JZQ__Q1KURBmbCs2n2tjJp_94zB-L6tGNki0d5ocro9tlg9HYfoI-IZHd8TQitEsBddmRG7MIKxAt7ylVmEro=&c=Te7tBmN3jLRPEycTLYksRAzHm8u3zLu_20okiV_BQ86FGMmG1ERaGg==&ch=jvyps_FxrbYmQfdS9DOVTtDTKfUwf27Apd0-Kn_B2YAk0riz5o_uvw==)** The Senate majority is truly at risk, and we CAN'T afford to lose it. It's our job to FIGHT! Karl Rove Paid for by Texans for Senator John Cornyn With you on board, we're one step closer to keeping Texas red and fighting to create a future we can all be proud of. On behalf of all of us, we're glad you're on board. Now that you're on Team Cornyn, make sure that you're keeping up to date with the latest news. The best way to do so? Following our campaign on [Facebook](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001UAp5v-zvkWMySxp4iHIpgGG8GS-EqJkouikBZ5ECBrjc3dmdbNGl0HWxxIrhHEgWUYgt8QAfdJnOLlbdoVvqkGElUC5kmczSRiYGXM3ZZVO1LtNSAQLWSW5uiCAxDFgcNfOUBvTrl-hikZBrOpNk808H-hX6VLLuKiMmeklqu-I=&c=Te7tBmN3jLRPEycTLYksRAzHm8u3zLu_20okiV_BQ86FGMmG1ERaGg==&ch=jvyps_FxrbYmQfdS9DOVTtDTKfUwf27Apd0-Kn_B2YAk0riz5o_uvw==) and [Twitter](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001UAp5v-zvkWMySxp4iHIpgGG8GS-EqJkouikBZ5ECBrjc3dmdbNGl0FPH6PcBwfGr1mIVjFLIqh4Xd4AcvLuvKLn39y2V6yr6ToAywdw17jH3y6rlXMQEpgiRpubCnwEMlqeIzizN3vbhuxAD76pi-bSRNsD_k3iD&c=Te7tBmN3jLRPEycTLYksRAzHm8u3zLu_20okiV_BQ86FGMmG1ERaGg==&ch=jvyps_FxrbYmQfdS9DOVTtDTKfUwf27Apd0-Kn_B2YAk0riz5o_uvw==) that way you'll always be the first to know when something important comes up. Now, if you're still reading this, we know you're really ready to stand up and protect Texas. To aid your fight, we suggest you turn [this song](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001UAp5v-zvkWMySxp4iHIpgGG8GS-EqJkouikBZ5ECBrjc3dmdbNGl0HWxxIrhHEgWjH_OKrhtxGlsd2Z2vl04mv-Go7kequDMZmidU9NtOFPsYKFY4kxdMnhK7Stmz_l0vrJkbiuHvwct5U00E1XjxRTasL2Wga3SaEZdGOFxGi0yeaHVrf-vdg==&c=Te7tBmN3jLRPEycTLYksRAzHm8u3zLu_20okiV_BQ86FGMmG1ERaGg==&ch=jvyps_FxrbYmQfdS9DOVTtDTKfUwf27Apd0-Kn_B2YAk0riz5o_uvw==) up on full volume and do anything you can to help stop the dangerous policies being pedaled by the left to oppose our president and replace our conservative Texas values. Once you're pumped up and ready to go, head over to our [volunteer page](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001UAp5v-zvkWMySxp4iHIpgGG8GS-EqJkouikBZ5ECBrjc3dmdbNGl0Jn_D72DPS2xQD9_6eDJ4-bIBMR6fKFz-pxikpzvN5d-r0IvGu2j2KUgw30QSbaaDS0LDLjHh0z6_b7rcIKnU3Tbzc7Hb5-RDZr_EccGG0IwKno1xjWd4EAlSz_lJUpzxxPT-sO33vhpKG9Y4LvJ0OMM0yNJcmKbPnrI-LPZoaXHSruQvSX_pu09OkKo8tq-NEjh7yZTXtbTCTfis0kgecKBfqD_tAgqz2CehUyHFo53dLbpaJfi1KGcLKyJxSoUuQ==&c=Te7tBmN3jLRPEycTLYksRAzHm8u3zLu_20okiV_BQ86FGMmG1ERaGg==&ch=jvyps_FxrbYmQfdS9DOVTtDTKfUwf27Apd0-Kn_B2YAk0riz5o_uvw==) and find out exactly how you can help. We'd be proud to have you join us. Thank you for all you do to support John Cornyn for Senate. Together, we can protect this great state we know and love, and promote a safe, prosperous, and healthy Texas. Contributions to Texans for Senator John Cornyn, Inc. are not tax deductible.

name: GOP Updates
subject: New Day, Same Political Tactics
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Drew Ferguson For Congress
body:
Democrats have made it abundantly clear they have no intention of constructively working with Congressional Republicans and President Trump. Pelosi and House Democrats showed that even during a crisis, they want to score political points.
Friend,

Democrats are trying to take advantage of a public health crisis because they never let a crisis go to waste.

Recently, House Democrats passed a 3 trillion dollar bill that they _**CLAIM**_ is to fight COVID-19 but is stuffed with Democrat policy priorities.

Previous relief packages had bipartisan support but Democrats made it abundantly clear they had no intention of constructively working with Congressional Republicans and President Trump this time around. They refused to negotiate and coordinate when crafting this legislation.

This package is designed to appeal to the Democrat liberal base as it has funding for Far-Left priorities including direct stimulus payments to illegal immigrants and undoing certain provisions of the Trump tax cuts.

Pelosi and House Democrats showed that even during a crisis, they want to score political points.

[**Unless we stand up to them, these political statements and tactics will continue. Help President Trump & House Republicans achieve a HISTORIC victory this November.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IDyaXJoSMdbYHYH_-bBsw5FeynbBN8pMgIIc2MANeKde0_K_4LFCLcfKqttNvh-NHlz4sd6WreTQlhiVOWtH2yx_UdAhUpGhDfbSsr8MgVkx9rmQXlmBJWlgulzc8vzetVazLuQOn2D81D-WSWqsrhoLL4yHJO_GSav6VespKTkA_ajpxZxjkReov7yEGZL5hqjvvE1fER_zKSBxXOio2lO9TQF2SvhUL9pS0xdfBkeKWbN6pv-P9Ofox8Usu7HhbFpWGIeKx7HFtVcvsOPHHEBWXk6OPdRz3878BsH_VdCrkj_CYOV_5pCvH_N2bF1YaqUjCQr1_dkn9N0Nbiju8zddvmecEYC-W6gVpqZ6SNu8sHVITyW3SgXRYk6Kl8GbXwPgNR7390MPXkZUsdqScX7kGfTru5aW&c=nTtK77ZMUJEaf_E0r_6KLG3SE9ZULvIv-wuy3fjDeq4t33qXHf8zLg==&ch=FppaQf_wVFgngot8v5Feys4iGBrtDFToIFCKrbyAVD_nrC8es6Yr6w==)

But instead of celebrating the successes made against the COVID-19 pandemic, Democrats continued attacking him and focused their energy on passing a $3 trillion spending package, which was full of partisan requests entirely unrelated to helping everyday Americans get back on their feet.

_Senator Todd Young is a fifth generation Hoosier whose commanding victory in 2016 led him to join the Senate Republican Majority.

Todd brings years of leadership experience from his background as a US Naval Academy graduate and a Marine. Todd's commitment to protecting conservative values and policies includes his fight for fiscal responsibility and America-first Foreign Affairs legislation. As a leading conservative voice in Washington, Todd simply wants to make government work better for his fellow Hoosiers and Americans nationwide.

This year, however, Todd's main priority is to defend Senate Republicans in battleground elections nationwide and he needs YOU to help him in this fight._

clean_body: There's simply too much on the line -- this seat and the House Majority -- to not act. == Friend, We 're fighting to give Californians a voice \-- restoring common-sense, bipartisan leadership to Congress. We 're fighting to take back the House\-- putting an end to the Left's socialist agenda. BUT without your help , we won't stand a chance in November. This is a top-targeted seat because whoever wins this seat will determine who controls the House Majority. We need all hands on deck to ensure we have the resources needed to take on our liberal, self-funded opponent and win. == Young is running for Congress to fight for lower taxes, fewer regulations, affordable healthcare, and a pro-business environment. She's an immigrant and proud conservative woman who is no stranger to the Left's attacks.They spent $10,000,000.00 to keep her out of office in 2018, and are already organizing to try to buy this seat again. Right now, we're not raising enough to flip this toss-up seat red and we need to level the playing field. It will be a fight to the finish, but you could push us over the top. == There's simply too much on the line -- this seat and the House Majority \-- to not act. Thank you, Team Young During this time of uncertainty, many American families are struggling to make ends meet. Please contribute only if you are able. name: Charles Booker
subject: New Poll (Mitch McConnell vs. me)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
A new poll came out today that shows a democratic candidate is neck and neck with Mitch McConnell in this race right now.
#
The good news keeps coming our way this week.
**A new poll came out today that shows any Democratic candidate is neck and neck with Mitch McConnell in this race right now.** Mitch is in deep trouble — if we keep fighting for just a couple more months, we can drastically change the future of Kentucky.
**But here’s the biggest problem standing in our path now to defeat Mitch: the Democratic establishment doesn’t want someone like me to win.**
They know that this campaign is serious about change and fighting for a working-class revolution. That scares them, so they’re trying to erase my voice in this race, even if it means hurting our chances of beating Mitch.
**[Can you chip in $5 to our campaign to send a strong message to the establishment and our opponents that the bold, progressive change this movement is fighting for is exactly what we want?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17567816/198759863/-205196119?refcode=em20200520&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMGJjMGU4My1lYjlhLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OA_94PI4BqzF9elZ3DNa_JaxpQPXY_Zn20sJI003YUk=)**
