I’m no stranger to being written off.
My entire life folks have told me what I’m trying to do is impossible or has never happened before._And every time, I’ve proved them wrong._
From becoming the youngest Black legislator in the state of Kentucky to mobilizing a historic movement of people that’s hungry for progressive change — I will not stop working for what I believe in.
**What the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee and the establishment need to accept is that they can’t speak for the people of Kentucky.** We the people are sick and tired of politics as usual.
We are sick and tired of seeing our state consistently fall behind the rest of our country in quality of life, education, health care, and so much more. **Things won’t get better unless we fight for it.**
**[If you’re with me in this fight — especially now that we’re down to less than 5 weeks until the primary — please make a contribution to our campaign today. No donation is too small.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17567819/198759866/-205196119?refcode=em20200520&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMGJjMGU4My1lYjlhLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OA_94PI4BqzF9elZ3DNa_JaxpQPXY_Zn20sJI003YUk=)**
**[contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17567820/198759867/-205196119?refcode=em20200520&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMGJjMGU4My1lYjlhLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OA_94PI4BqzF9elZ3DNa_JaxpQPXY_Zn20sJI003YUk=)**
Together,
Charles

name: Kathy Landing for Congress
subject: Latest Poll Numbers are STRONG
body:
| | | | The independent poll conducted by FTS Insights shows that I not only have a 1.6% lead over Joe Cunningham in a head-to-head matchup but I also am in a nearly 25% better position than Nancy Mace against Joe Cunningham.
---
---
Email not displaying correctly? [View it](https://sg-mktg.) in your browser.
---
Dear Lowcountry Neighbors, I will keep this email brief. _The latest polling numbers are incredibly strong for our campaign._ They reaffirm what we have been saying since day one: **I am the strongest Republican candidate to beat Joe Cunningham in the fall.** In fact, the independent poll conducted by FTS Insights shows that **_I not only have a 1.66% lead over Joe Cunningham in a head-to-head matchup but I also am in a nearly 25% better position than Nancy Mace against Joe Cunningham._**
---
[](https://u10736622.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=1AWnnx1cmgNc12r02Nab4E8zmGUG17fwiPrhNf5t0PfekA8sK1-2BIxkCJr7879K8GlYCGBefuJdzlOr35PgrGgibufWHynWegd2UjzMXxxho-3DhLP9_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjI06VISPfJIPkjxFld-2Brrley4L5h37OHrLKB1q1AlMO8Vfr33vLs5R3UApbGvqm4ZpanMKlAjWdQAcdSlWgET8avZXfovhQ9j2R2VpaEr4Vdff1NOnMSx77p99VWP4az9UJOAN-2Bl3GejbUIeLGst3hrEGo-2BhZGqq93WYq3fmmlKDvdavJSo0yQmVaezf48wOCgDDKClJv4od7OuoF7CNBMpWpHRi6k4foR5tMlqMqAC3Hq0DWN3bLvT-2B837xdlVGPBapm3pr3dfaIUeH0h7tEW-2Frnz5DE-2B339G09uE6WephDYFvVJUK61-2F5oKp37NOrGqCiBAn4wd-2BWyXGJUIi-2FZkQZjxqU-2F6xWTKCqrBxPpOlkf7NypU7Z3LUe7ggm76DbxLQp5siC-2FM37FcGK2AmyaTVe-2F-2FNswM12HPlLCoJc9KkuQ-3D-3D)
---
I know that I can beat Joe Cunningham this fall. This poll is proof of that. But, in order to get that matchup, we must win the Republican Primary on June 9th. [_That is why, with just 20 days until the election, I humbly ask that you consider donating $20 to our campaign 's efforts today._](https://u10736622.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=1AWnnx1cmgNc12r02Nab4E8zmGUG17fwiPrhNf5t0PfekA8sK1-2BIxkCJr7879K8GlYCGBefuJdzlOr35PgrGgibufWHynWegd2UjzMXxxho-3DAQrw_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjI06VISPfJIPkjxFld-2Brrley4L5h37OHrLKB1q1AlMO8Vfr33vLs5R3UApbGvqm4ZpanMKlAjWdQAcdSlWgET8avZXfovhQ9j2R2VpaEr4Vdff1NOnMSx77p99VWP4az9UJOAN-2Bl3GejbUIeLGst3hrEGo-2BhZGqq93WYq3fmmlKAPfXOdTC-2FJrzY-2BJN8TWGc7b2kyxkAj9SjhrIXf1Sr8ecLE3Xa23fe10lO-2FT01Qr1OiroQ4V69QT9iqkPfKdwxompvZ7WE2lQ-2BSbX-2BmXJzh24lPi79P1F0mNaC-2FCJGRf2KH5WrIt9PVYKjZy8EuZyDWnn7jESelJO3pegqiWWWD63ycysmM2Niw61pbmoLYq4UItqkcKyAgdOwgj2jdcJwd4wh3dFgAJtnJnGppEKhlBJRVwr4P-2FPzxnG-2B2zEiiegA-3D-3D) Your $20 donation can cover the cost of 5 yard signs... or 10 bumper magnets... or 200 text messages... or 500 phone calls. As you can see, **your $20 donation can go a very long way in helping our campaign finish strong!** I thank you in advance for your consideration to donate and for your continued support, prayers and vote as we enter the final stretch! God Bless,
---

| Kathy Landing Conservative Republican for Congress

I know that I can beat Joe Cunningham this fall. This poll is proof of that. But, in order to get that matchup, we must win the Republican Primary on June 9th. Your $20 donation can cover the cost of 5 yard signs... or 10 bumper magnets... or 200 text messages... or 500 phone calls. As you can see, your $20 donation can go a very long way in helping our campaign finish strong! I thank you in advance for your consideration to donate and for your continued support, prayers and vote as we enter the final stretch! God Bless, | Kathy Landing Conservative Republican for Congress | | "Facebook " | "Twitter " ---|--- | | Kathy Landing for Congress PO Box 31338 Charleston, SC 29417 == |

name: Marvin Masters
subject: Asking a favor
body:
www.justicehutch.com/donate [www.justicehutch.com/donate]
Dear Friend:
As we approach Election Day, all eyes become intensely focused on the races at hand. For our West Virginia communities, there are no more significant races than those for the WV Supreme Court of Appeals.
I have supported John Hutchison from the day he announced his candidacy to remain on the Court. I joined the Campaign Committee because I believe his 24 years of experience in the courtroom is unmatched among the candidates in this race.
These are fragile times, and our court system will undoubtedly feel the stress of this pandemic and the impending recovery. We need Justices with experience to guide our court system through the expanding caseload of bankruptcies, child neglect, and family law cases that will surely follow in the coming months and years.
As 10th Circuit Court Judge, John Hutchison oversaw one of the busiest circuit courts in the state. During his 23-year tenure as a circuit court judge, he closed an estimated 22,800 cases, including numerous backlogged cases within the justice system.
John has the experience the Supreme Court needs.
We need his legal mind on the bench.
We need his judicial temperament to lead our court system.
Let's Keep Justice John Hutchison on the Supreme Court
It's the right decision for our West Virginia communities
Make a donation and Keep Our Supreme Court on the right path. [https://www.justicehutch.com/donate]
https://www.justicehutch.com/donate [https://www.justicehutch.com/donate]
Connect With Us:Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/justicejohnhutchison] Contact Info:Committee to Keep Justice Hutchison
PO Box 5176
Beckley, WV 25801
United States
Twitter [https://twitter.com/justicehutch]

https://www.justicehutch.com/donate [https://www.justicehutch.com/donate]

name: Thank the Post Office [Team Ben Ray]
subject: USPS SAVES vote-by-mail
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
---
| | [**Great News: USPS pledges to deliver vote-by-mail ballots even without postage!**](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b15f/18e32a7f/4c3e454f/7b21a88d/2106944425/VEsH/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/Thank-USPS-postcard?source=20200519_em_pet_b1_tpov_ia") [We're depending on you to thank the post office: The USPS just confirmed it will deliver vote-by-mail ballots even without postage! But Trump is working overtime to sabotage them. To ruin Trump's plan and show overwhelming appreciation for the USPS, we want to collect 10,000 signatures to thank the post office. Will you sign the card and send them your signature? >> ](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b15f/18e32a7f/4c3e454f/7b21a88d/2106944425/VEsE/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/Thank-USPS-postcard?source=20200519_em_pet_b1_tpov_ia") Thanks to the post office, Americans will be able to safely vote from home in this historic election.

Postal workers are risking their own health every day to deliver ballots.

But Trump wants to bankrupt the USPS and stop us from voting him OUT of office.

**[We want to thwart Trump's plan and show our HUGE appreciation for the USPS. _Will you help us reach 10,000 signatures strong before midnight to thank the USPS?_ ↙️↙️](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b15f/18e32a7f/4c3e454f/7b21a88d/2106944425/VEsF/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/Thank-USPS-postcard?source=20200519_em_pet_b1_tpov_ia")** | **[Thank you, USPS!](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b15f/18e32a7f/4c3e454f/7b21a88d/2106944425/VEsC/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/Thank-USPS-postcard?source=20200519_em_pet_b1_tpov_ia")**

You are risking it all to keep our Democracy afloat and letting us vote from home.

**[From: dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b15f/18e32a7f/4c3e454f/7b21a88d/2106944425/VEsD/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/Thank-USPS-postcard?source=20200519_em_pet_b1_tpov_ia")**

| [**Sign the card by midnight >>**](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b15f/18e32a7f/4c3e454f/7b21a88d/2106944425/VEsA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/Thank-USPS-postcard?source=20200519_em_pet_b1_tpov_ia")
---
Thank you,

Team Ben Ray

---
[](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b15f/18e32a7f/4c3e454f/7b21a882/2106944425/VEsB/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b15f/18e32a7f/4c3e454f/7b21a883/2106944425/VEsO/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b15f/18e32a7f/4c3e454f/7b21a880/2106944425/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families.

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United.

**Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. Will you pitch in to fund our people-powered movement today?** **[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b15f/18e32a7f/4c3e454f/7b21a881/2106944425/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")** We know that we send you a lot of emails. If you would like to only receive the most important updates, [_click here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b15f/18e32a7f/4c3e454f/7b21a886/2106944425/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails").

If you would like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. You can keep up with our campaign by visiting us on _[Facebook](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b15f/18e32a7f/4c3e454f/7b21a887/2106944425/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan/")_ or _[Twitter](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b15f/18e32a7f/4c3e454f/7b21a883/2106944425/VEsHBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan")_ or online at _[benraylujan.com](www.benraylujan.com)_. Click the button below to unsubscribe and your request will be promptly processed. **[UNSUBSCRIBE](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b15f/18e32a7f/4c3e454f/7b21a884/2106944425/VEsHAQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe")**

People for Ben

Albuquerque, NM 87125

name: Ryan Winkler
subject: Still working
disclaimer_text: paid for by the DFL House Caucus
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/hTAQPJXzFuu0iSiNre1zlCjy84mRqFhvmk3KhWMVPLY=/BOwe94UT13GloaoSAizJlGHFZuAtVmC-oLHUL6v2HYs=?refcode=052020)
| | Friend, Despite a pandemic we were able to make progress this session on issues important to Minnesotans.
* We worked together to finally tackle the insulin affordability crisis, enacting the Alec Smith Insulin Affordability Act.
* We passed the Prescription Drug Transparency Act to bring down the cost of prescription drugs.
* We put significant differences with Republicans aside to pass important legislation to keep our elections safe and secure.
* We successfully worked to provide additional help to our farmers, ban the toxic chemical TCE, and raise the age to purchase tobacco to 21.
* We invested in the health & safety of Minnesotans based on the science and facts of the COVID-19 pandemic.

We are incredibly proud of the work we were able to accomplish on your behalf this year. **We would be honored if you invested in our campaign to protect and expand our progressive majority in the Minnesota House.** _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately_ [**Refundable $50**](https://act.myngp.com/el/hTAQPJXzFuu0iSiNre1zlCjy84mRqFhvmk3KhWMVPLY=/BOwe94UT13GloaoSAizJlGHFZuAtVmC-oLHUL6v2HYs=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=052020) [**Refundable $100**](https://act.myngp.com/el/hTAQPJXzFuu0iSiNre1zlCjy84mRqFhvmk3KhWMVPLY=/BOwe94UT13GloaoSAizJlGHFZuAtVmC-oLHUL6v2HYs=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=052020) [**Or, other amount**](https://act.myngp.com/el/hTAQPJXzFuu0iSiNre1zlCjy84mRqFhvmk3KhWMVPLY=/BOwe94UT13GloaoSAizJlGHFZuAtVmC-oLHUL6v2HYs=?express_lane_other=true&refcode=052020) _You can donate $50 (or $100 per couple) and it will be refunded to you by the state through the Minnesota Political Contribution Refund Program._ Just because the legislative session is now over, doesn't mean our work ends. **We will continue working to safeguard Minnesotans ' health and economic well-being during COVID-19 and beyond.** Thank you for your continued support and trust, **Ryan Winkler** Majority Leader Minnesota House of Representatives [_P.S. In the state of Minnesota,**you can donate up to $50 (or $100 per couple) per year and it will be refunded to you** by the state._](https://act.myngp.com/el/hTAQPJXzFuu0iSiNre1zlCjy84mRqFhvmk3KhWMVPLY=/CxOmxCSpSMmvp9rRuCiUSHQaWhDskTjw4ToOftuuSd8=?refcode=052020) [**Donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/hTAQPJXzFuu0iSiNre1zlCjy84mRqFhvmk3KhWMVPLY=/BOwe94UT13GloaoSAizJlGHFZuAtVmC-oLHUL6v2HYs=?refcode=052020)

clean_body: | | Friend, Despite a pandemic we were able to make progress this session on issues important to Minnesotans. We worked together to finally tackle the insulin affordability crisis, enacting the Alec Smith Insulin Affordability Act. We passed the Prescription Drug Transparency Act to bring down the cost of prescription drugs. We put significant differences with Republicans aside to pass important legislation to keep our elections safe and secure. We successfully worked to provide additional help to our farmers, ban the toxic chemical TCE, and raise the age to purchase tobacco to 21. We invested in the health & safety of Minnesotans based on the science and facts of the COVID-19 pandemic. We are incredibly proud of the work we were able to accomplish on your behalf this year. We would be honored if you invested in our campaign to protect and expand our progressive majority in the Minnesota House. If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately You can donate $50 (or $100 per couple) and it will be refunded to you by the state through the Minnesota Political Contribution Refund Program. Just because the legislative session is now over, doesn't mean our work ends. We will continue working to safeguard Minnesotans ' health and economic well-being during COVID-19 and beyond. Thank you for your continued support and trust, Ryan Winkler** Majority Leader Minnesota House of Representatives | Prepared and paid for by the DFL House Caucus. | I have bad news, Peter: Right now this race is a toss-up, and we are being outspent by HUGE margins. Even worse, we still haven't hit our goal to fund our critical Get Out The Vote operations.
In a race this close, we cannot afford to fall behind. We only have 13 days left to close the gap, and if we fall behind, we won't have any chance of catching up and making New Mexico better.
But Peter - I know Claire told you the good news yesterday: a group of generous donors stepped up to match all gifts between now and Thursday to help fund our GOTV operations. But Peter - I know Claire told you the good news yesterday: a group of generous donors stepped up to match all gifts between now and Thursday to help fund our GOTV operations. == | | | == | God bless, | Mike Berg Campaign Manager Claire Chase for Congress | | | == == == | | | PAID FOR BY CLAIRE CHASE FOR CONGRESS INC. | | Claire Chase for Congress | PO Box 8010, Roswell, NM 88202 | | Sent by mailto:mike@clairechase.org

name: Supreme Court Update
subject: Sen. Cornyn is a total hypocrite
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
What a surprise!

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489004f/7f51f7bc/4e6dfe13/4ef6be03/1057327578/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

---
Peter -- One thing Sen. John Cornyn and his D.C. boss Mitch McConnell are actually good at? Forcing their handpicked judges and _only_ their handpicked judges -- who are highly ideological and YOUNG -- onto the federal bench and the U.S. Supreme Court!

Remember when they refused to even hold confirmation hearings on nominee Merrick Garland in 2016? **HYPOCRISY ALERT: Now Sen. Cornyn says he 'll fill any opening that comes up this year, regardless of the November election.**
**[PITCH IN TO HELP MJ
DEFEAT SEN. CORNYN! ](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489004f/7f51f7bc/4e6dfe13/4ef6be02/1057327578/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0MzcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200520.2nd__1437__&amount=10")**
Here's how bad Sen. Cornyn's choices are:
* His handpicked district court judge struck down the ACA in court -- and by the way, that same judge used to work for him!
* Two appellate court judges that he voted to confirm have **already issued a ruling that puts the entire ACA in jeopardy.**
* Now that case is before the Supreme Court -- where the hyperpartisan justices that he supported could be the deciding votes!

At a time when the nation's highest court is considering cases that deal with reproductive rights, protections for LGBTQ people, and more, **we need a champion for the people voting on who gets on the bench -- not a partisan hack!**

Texans need a senator who will fight for working people, not special interests -- and Sen. Cornyn fails the test. Will you pitch in to help MJ defeat him this November?

name: Team Warner
subject: Show your support for vote by mail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Become a citizen co-sponsor for the VoteSafe Act
|
---
| | Derek --

**Mark Warner is proud to join his Senate colleagues to introduce the VoteSafe Act** to expand early voting and vote-by-mail availability and make sure _every_ American can safely cast their ballot in November. **[_Add your name as a citizen co-sponsor of this important bill._](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d491/53d9897e/549df2a5/1c8877b1/3348894764/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-votesafe")** The VoteSafe Act aims to help people cast their ballots safely by:
* Requiring every state to allow all residents to vote by mail in all 2020 elections;
* Mandating that every state conduct early in-person voting for at least 20 days prior to all remaining 2020 elections; and
* Improving the voter registration process so that everyone is ready for Election Day.

Thanks to our General Assembly, Virginia already has expanded ballot access, and Mark believes that every voter should have the same opportunity to safely cast their ballot. We have to act quickly on this -- if these protections aren't in place by the general election, folks will have to choose between protecting their health and voting. **That 's not a choice anyone should have to make.**

Mark is committed to making sure everyone has the opportunity to cast their vote in the November general election **_and_** protect their health. **[Will you help Mark raise public awareness of the VoteSafe Act and become a citizen co-sponsor?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d491/53d9897e/549df2a5/1c8877b1/3348894764/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-votesafe")** **[Sign on as a citizen co-sponsor](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d491/53d9897e/549df2a5/1c8877b1/3348894764/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-votesafe")** Thank you,

Team Warner

| **[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d491/53d9897e/549df2a5/1c8877b0/3348894764/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU4NiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-votesafep?refcode=20200520_p_1_fl__586__&refcode2=cont&amount=10")**
---

|
---

Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d491/53d9897e/549df2a5/1c8877bf/3348894764/VEsD/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

name: Lexie, Team Christy
subject: A simple but powerful thing you can do
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Peter --

There's one simple but powerful thing you can do to set this campaign up to defeat Mike Garcia in November:

**Become a monthly donor.**

When you set up a recurring monthly gift, we know we can count on you to be with us all the way through the election. Plus, it directly impacts the budgets I draw up for our campaign -- every recurring donation is more money I can put towards long-term items like more organizers and new technology.

**[So, if you can, make a monthly recurring donation to our campaign today. It makes a world of difference.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bba4/29776869/986d3d7/569f2245/1023264572/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MjBfcmVjdXJyaW5nLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christy_monthly?refcode=em20_200520_recurring-full&recurring=1")** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your monthly recurring donation will go through immediately: [$15 = 1 month video conference software](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bba4/29776869/986d3d7/569f2246/1023264572/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MjBfcmVjdXJyaW5nLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A hosting](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bba4/29776869/986d3d7/569f2240/1023264572/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MjBfcmVjdXJyaW5nLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A voters](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bba4/29776869/986d3d7/569f2241/1023264572/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MjBfcmVjdXJyaW5nLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christy_monthly?refcode=em20_200520_recurring-full&recurring=1&express_lane=true&amount=100") [Donate another monthly amount](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bba4/29776869/986d3d7/569f2245/1023264572/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MjBfcmVjdXJyaW5nLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christy_monthly?refcode=em20_200520_recurring-full&recurring=1") When you give monthly, you are setting us up for success. We can rely on your support for our monthly expenses so we can focus on hiring more staff, planning our mail program, and much more.

**Nothing means more than knowing you have our backs.**

**[Peter, please chip in any amount you can to give monthly to our campaign.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bba4/29776869/986d3d7/569f2245/1023264572/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MjBfcmVjdXJyaW5nLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christy_monthly?refcode=em20_200520_recurring-full&recurring=1")**

Thanks so much for your continued support -- it means so much!

\-- Lexie

Finance Director, Christy for Congress

name: Senator Tom Cotton
subject: Iowa deserves better
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate 2226 Cottondale Lane
body:
Martha McSally and I have been outspoken about holding China accountable. While Martha has been working hard to protect Americans’ lives, it was discovered that her opponent’s firm has taken money from a Chinese company controlled by the Chinese Communist Party. We can’t let Martha lose to such a dangerous candidate.Click here to unsubscribe http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/OneClickOptOutServlet?m=42546137&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MjAwMjg5NgS2&mt=1&rt=0 Peter,

Let’s be clear:

China caused this pandemic.

China tried to coverup the spread of the virus by arresting doctors, lying to the world, and corrupting the World Health Organization. The murderous Chinese Communist government cannot be trusted.

Martha McSally and I have been outspoken about holding China accountable. While Martha has been working hard to protect Americans’ lives, it was discovered that her opponent’s firm has taken money from a Chinese company controlled by the Chinese Communist Party. We can’t let Martha lose to such a dangerous candidate – Chip in $5, $10, $25, or more to keep Martha McSally in the Senate! http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI1NDYxMzcS1&kn=18&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTc2MjAwMjg5NgS2&mt=1&rt=0

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kathaleen=20Wall?=
subject: No VFW Post is shutting down on my watch
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathaleen Wall for Congress
body:
I'm leading a community effort to save the Pearland VFW | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ba514dc880a6/release-kathaleen-wall-responds-to-the-house-vote-to-impeach-president-trump-12457193?e=01c99b7fbd)
---
| |
---
| **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE:** Wednesday, May 20, 2020
---
| | **Conservative Kathaleen Wall Announces Community Effort To Save Pearland VFW Post 7109 **

_Sugar Land Republican Responds To Local VFW Post 7109 Announcement That Without Hall Rentals And Sales During COVID Shutdown Their Doors Will Permanently Close _

_“No VFW Post In The District Is Going To Shut Down On My Watch, And Certainly Not Because Of The So-Called ‘Chinese Virus.’ These Veterans Have Served And Fought For The United States And Texas, And Now We’re Going To Fight For Them.”_

**(Sugar Land, TX)** – Sugar Land Republican Congressional Candidate (TX-22) Kathaleen Wall today announced a community-wide effort to save VFW Post 7109 in Pearland from having to permanently close their doors by launching a comprehensive, all-encompassing emergency fundraising drive. Because of a lack of hall rentals and sales since the global Coronavirus pandemic caused stay-at-home orders, VFW Post 7109 urgently needs $20,000 to stay open, and Wall pledges to make sure the Post reaches this goal.

“No VFW Post in the District is going to shut down on my watch, and certainly not because of the so-called ‘Chinese Virus.’ These veterans have served and fought for the United States and Texas, and now we’re going to fight for them,” said Wall. “This virus has wreaked havoc on American lives, American businesses and our entire economy. Now is the time for us to stand together to protect our local institutions, like VFW Post 7109.”

Just six months after their 50th anniversary, the Pearland VFW Post has served the community generously and wholeheartedly. Wall brought attention to their dire situation last week, and as the potential closure date approaches has now launched a community-wide effort to save the hall.

“I’m asking everyone in the community to contribute as you are able to help VFW Post 7109 in Pearland reach their $20,000 goal. I’ve started by giving $1,000 myself and will match up to $5,000 for donations, and I encourage folks to sacrifice for those who have served us so bravely,” Wall declared.

To make donations to VFW Post 7109 and track the progress to their goal, their GoFundMe page can be found at [https://charity.gofundme.com/o/en/campaign/savepearlandvfw7109](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=1bdded414a&e=01c99b7fbd) .

“I am so thankful that during this global pandemic, patriots know how to dig deep and help provide for the very veterans who sacrificed greatly to protect our freedom,” Wall concluded.

###
---
|
---

Now is the time for us to stand together to protect our local institutions, like VFW Post 7109.” Just six months after their 50th anniversary, the Pearland VFW Post has served the community generously and wholeheartedly. Wall brought attention to their dire situation last week, and as the potential closure date approaches has now launched a community-wide effort to save the hall. “I’m asking everyone in the community to contribute as you are able to help VFW Post 7109 in Pearland reach their $20,000 goal. I’ve started by giving $1,000 myself and will match up to $5,000 for donations, and I encourage folks to sacrifice for those who have served us so bravely,” Wall declared. To make donations to VFW Post 7109 and track the progress to their goal, their GoFundMe page can be found at . “I am so thankful that during this global pandemic, patriots know how to dig deep and help provide for the very veterans who sacrificed greatly to protect our freedom,” Wall concluded. | | | | | | | Paid for by Kathaleen Wall for Congress Kathaleen Wall for CongressP.O. Box 1429Sugar Land, TX 77487 You can or .

name: Blue Georgia
subject: re: Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
Senate control is up for grabs - and it could all come down to Georgia.
| | |
---
**Friend: Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight says that Senate control is up for grabs - and it could all come down to Georgia. **
That's why unelected Sen. Kelly Loeffler (R-GA) **just launched a MASSIVE $4 million ad blitz** - and why she's pledged to spend $20 MILLION of her own fortune to buy this seat and strengthen Mitch McConnell's grip on power.
Reverend Raphael Warnock (D) is the strong leader Democrats need to flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate, but Mitch McConnell is lining up the FULL BACKING of the GOP establishment to defeat him. **Now, NEW polling shows Reverend Warnock and Kelly Loeffler _neck and neck_!**
**Democrats cannot take back the Senate without winning here in Georgia. Plain and simple. But for Reverend Warnock to fight back against right-wing attacks, pull ahead and win this race, he needs to raise another $7,834 before our critical match opportunity expires at midnight tonight. **
**[_So please, friend: With Senate control at stake, will you give $5 or more right now - every dollar will be DOUBLED - to get us back on track, flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate for Democrats?_](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e780/288179be/bee6c23/348ea6a3/3434266386/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMjMzLWZyLW5kLXYyIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk233-fr-nd-v2&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")****In a race this close, every dollar could make the difference between winning and losing - so thank you for pitching in to help end McConnell's majority once and for all.**

Peter, have you seen the news?

Presumptive Democratic nominee Joe Biden _lied_ about his role in potentially setting General Michael Flynn up and sabotaging the incoming Trump Administration. Joe Biden initially said he knew nothing about the investigation. However, new intelligence reports show that Biden himself was amongst a group of senior Obama Administration officials who requested the unmasking of General Flynn.

Biden's unprecedented actions ruined General Flynn's career and provoked the Russia collusion hoax, which Democrats then used to try to impeach the President. _Biden himself used the hoax to try to push President Trump out of the White House and then lied about ever being involved. _

subject: People, not pensions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by LaHood for Congress |
body:
Illinois Democrats keep finding new ways to mismanage COVID-19 relief funds. Stand with Darin against them [ ](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=38de95d370ba42a4a81e02204f479585&_e=uOc1N7IFZ_o8nwnZPmUB8YnhwyHzpGL8IfkcP7K3DvHLyq81TQeUGW8RCwbTCInUN0qTnJZRf8EW8feH84oBvsn63o_8yhRevYrgqgOKypG2v4DcuIZ-OPxTgcFSjoeIRTZoTreh1CrQ3f2COOrJFKD6svMbfOnCGm_WcZVzdcq-yp6CSeFG-LMK6V0d4nOqRJPT9hDh1hSs6XlZ8VGm7FMNy62OQ3iHSzG-eljzeJp7jnkfARnII2ws3M1tXJchWDOFLBhWIFaps0Wi5Ba6GoDFyrMDfKK1ftmwJRCD_eTIp6oxwortLrBOsKko28lJzy57q50rV-RQgo0zQRukeMHTviewLRpXyw8ElDig8BjzOspTgCyf5ULWZDUX522695B8MciyQr3XKd3gqctazma5eMXCTktIvFf-l74iQpcXk07EMupO69O28bs3IgPDM9gNC_o9042QCS6wrHD-dWkmseDtKu3Kx9zdIVq1CWQ%3D) | |
---
Friend,

For decades, career politicians with no concept of a balanced budget have worked night and day to dig the state of Illinois into a $192 billion hole.

_**Now, those same career politicians are asking Congress for $44 billion in COVID-19 relief funds to bail out Illinois’s overdrafted pension fund.**_
[**ADD YOUR NAME: REJECT THE ILLINOIS PENSION BAILOUT**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=38de95d370ba42a4a81e02204f479585&_e=uOc1N7IFZ_o8nwnZPmUB8YnhwyHzpGL8IfkcP7K3DvHLyq81TQeUGW8RCwbTCInUN0qTnJZRf8EW8feH84oBvsn63o_8yhRevYrgqgOKypG2v4DcuIZ-OPxTgcFSjoeIRTZoTreh1CrQ3f2COOrJFKD6svMbfOnCGm_WcZVzdcq-yp6CSeFG-LMK6V0d4nOqRJPT9hDh1hSs6XlZ8VGm7FMNy62OQ3iHSzG-eljzeJp7jnkfARnII2ws3M1tXJchWDOFLBhWIFaps0Wi5Ba6Gqx2mFg1gMFXovj7xhFWjnUOpgtKVCXccZPH1JoOfPS0TW-2h5VO6wHfBCWuqAMnamuJveOT57W7XBAgc0TvOxLpuYErGTb8VpYMtjkOtPkx11hSwrl68D7AonG_QkFGSgtmtyQsKfKeCdEBVzEwjRw84ZUjDyvSDBkHC4sEQ7lRf1rY3J0FVuJS6X2Hke7jd-3dGrbIwmg8tjsh8Pev5eQ%3D)
These relief dollars – paid by taxpayers just like you – should only end up in the pockets of America’s farmers, small business owners, and working families – **not self-serving politicians.**

Darin is taking a firm stand against Illinois Senate leaders on this issue. Will you join him?
[**ADD YOUR NAME: REJECT THE ILLINOIS PENSION BAILOUT**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=38de95d370ba42a4a81e02204f479585&_e=uOc1N7IFZ_o8nwnZPmUB8YnhwyHzpGL8IfkcP7K3DvHLyq81TQeUGW8RCwbTCInUN0qTnJZRf8EW8feH84oBvsn63o_8yhRevYrgqgOKypG2v4DcuIZ-OPxTgcFSjoeIRTZoTreh1CrQ3f2COOrJFKD6svMbfOnCGm_WcZVzdcq-yp6CSeFG-LMK6V0d4nOqRJPT9hDh1hSs6XlZ8VGm7FMNy62OQ3iHSzG-eljzeJp7jnkfARnII2ws3M1tXJchWDOFLBhWIFaps0Wi5Ba6GmTAHjrN9gvV86Bughbqert9_lwCb0dUt9p3xOGIl7AXIOyOH5vGmYJImzWByfJbqKJx0oxNUe1eenDN1RMBQvuslsgkD-qZti8sFyuRfObVZ9znH8LGQkeQ9Oe8xOYgHQC_3QiiD8aQAovvejj2CZjSJ7x7dOKwLeJ43EfRLrEd8_pFuBxQ01u1-TXml2xQ0l22vwgyH05Q4V684maFhyU%3D)
Friend, the pension bailout isn’t the only way Illinois is mismanaging COVID-19 relief dollars.

Governor Pritzker is working hard to block those funds from going to localities that violate his stay-at-home order – _**as if the order wasn’t harmful enough already to our small businesses.**_

Darin isn’t backing down. He teamed up with the other four Illinois House Republicans to stand up to Governor Pritzker’s power grab. **Will you stand up with Darin for our farmers, businesses, and workers?**
[**ADD YOUR NAME: REJECT PRITZKER’S POWER GRAB**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=38de95d370ba42a4a81e02204f479585&_e=uOc1N7IFZ_o8nwnZPmUB8YnhwyHzpGL8IfkcP7K3DvHLyq81TQeUGW8RCwbTCInUN0qTnJZRf8EW8feH84oBvsn63o_8yhRevYrgqgOKypG2v4DcuIZ-OPxTgcFSjoeIRTZoTreh1CrQ3f2COOrJFKD6svMbfOnCGm_WcZVzdcq-yp6CSeFG-LMK6V0d4nOqRJPT9hDh1hSs6XlZ8VGm7FMNy62OQ3iHSzG-eljzeJp7jnkfARnII2ws3M1tXJchWDOFLBhWIFaps0Wi5Ba6GrwFWMNmgSTmLYIJiFaLkROyhj59_yqzP6Fc4Er9zc2NyZRrVDFEokrR2opEaQsV5_7eUcChqODEm1Xw0cj03sYVX8m69YkRCd1h5X5le0trKeMjZpfZTX5RNrcFYy7F0Rf9PLISeUk1hdKk9WYbYOi44sh8qcNOFVUA8aGKR3pWRYJQqyHR72caA7yENqwTvhawtFrU1uLannUtzFlfHBc%3D)

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: One Indiana: Honoring America’s Heroes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
This year, Memorial Day weekend will look a little different in towns and cities across Indiana. Friend, This year, Memorial Day weekend will look a little different in towns and cities across Indiana. It will be a little bit quieter and a little less raucous — the Indy 500 will run in August, and many other large gatherings are also postponed. **But one thing can’t be postponed. We must honor our heroes no matter what, including every single Hoosier who has made the ultimate sacrifice while serving our nation in uniform.** Memorial Day has its roots in the period following the Civil War — which saw the largest number of American military casualties of any war in our history. Honoring those who lost their lives defending our freedoms is a tradition that we must keep, no matter the circumstances. Here are some ways that you can honor our fallen service members while staying safe this Memorial Day:
* **Fly Your Flag** – There’s no better way to honor America than flying our colors – red, white and blue! [**Here’s a FAQ from the American Legion on the proper ways to display Old Glory.**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=c4c07d65aa6d4864bab1dbfcd29d38c0&_e=HsJhRmvChE0KsxaiAvIxQ-SqK5IkCge0Lz_IMcr15lWjdEXh0uGvI3aaz7tkMu5uTPNQnkjk6giCvlhZt0y1zPwJds1ESYMLeVRgclcq-d9rXgCa7SwNEIkdkGoKeLqZVHWBCEagdLUNzmS3tNUjpqxoy_xnIBGD8nqOuauLf5BPGvRArkF0s_O-dZNjzjcoTaCjJITmF96BshDF317KkVlviuuso23bc0KMYAw8yCFS0KhMfCdMwaLh0cNHbRSSD4AHG0IuET8Dslach3WDhA46bo_UNJ3DJ4P8lQCChXBmSkw26iNwb7TDFmRYtLA789LlAwArD8RhLtq8kebbAyRqkRuwcrXRcOWqhQO_2SI_pkOnleFL0lj6sqSQrpSEbzHfMT5iZPC-NrK89GtSVoZb7zH0QayYEo7m6tVt1-E%3D)
* **Visit a War Memorial** – Our state’s capital city, Indianapolis, has more acreage dedicated to honoring our fallen heroes than any other U.S. city – and the city’s number of war memorials is only second to Washington, D.C. Due to COVID-19, you won’t be able to go inside these monuments, but you can plan socially-distanced visits outside.
* **Support our Service Organizations** – Service organizations like the American Legion (headquartered in Indiana!), the Veterans of Foreign Wars, AMVETS, and others are run by our veterans and honor their fellow servicemembers they have lost. Consider supporting these organizations as they’ve supported us.
* **Light a Candle** – Light a candle and put it on your front porch at dusk to light our communities in remembrance of our fallen heroes. **[Read more from the American Legion on what the colors of each candle symbolize.](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=c4c07d65aa6d4864bab1dbfcd29d38c0&_e=HsJhRmvChE0KsxaiAvIxQ86OCGU1J4aYV-UJOYayUvcowz2jMdckJ9TC_G6QoShSu0WoS8LOjKrYLgjBLlZbLmtD6twRpw249up02VXg1ARSUPwkG0fiAOAXP19-bkruZSNi8wGn0FZEzI8BjVmQR7n1gj2Pc92ktykVN8sFzz6pULXcwWxz-0vz39NDWwvy1gaXJA4nCfinZIFsfzre0DQXrubAKL7rkUocSUmvWpyEnXDqL00a6o7u2krU7pIqVhA4fC_EflBffx5kD_lEwPIW40qOM4kZxOrptuivFMl3FjZ-Gf216o2f7T5ygtHKfejLcC_U4E-TWSTLm7rFGnGuQDyk_UAzBFnJK0fsZZYsvgG0sfjxiuZzlz4fk9LUSUlt6r4rkPgEmt1jbv2CDjUL2wzMQAo8IPUnD9y7ekZMvM4wZjhmA-1tfw-gMbv_wsGG7QONJsa0D_FZ7UqYYjuWvUOKXKGyUfEFAO5Bgpw%3D)**
* **Have a Moment of Silence** – As an act of symbolic unity, join Americans across the country for a moment of silence at 3 p.m. local time on Memorial Day.
* **Visit a Military Cemetery** – Take a moment to visit the final resting place of those who gave their lives defending freedom. **[You can find a map of military cemeteries in Indiana here.](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=c4c07d65aa6d4864bab1dbfcd29d38c0&_e=HsJhRmvChE0KsxaiAvIxQ7mw3KMTBU_2yeFupdKoTIy6hQgNAeEuVlbuezlU9oRGn5AhSDXTnidjjARULBCXGspGwXy9xxA1PyCEFPTjsS_joyzXvXTsxS-AOD2SOdPEJgGuP80CBn93TTgbwBUlHLcnYnVrk876BL2r8-U2IEEOpOpaJ3I4iw25SWamyZ0-Ecnf352lmolZzVfW7OQYza3QovpJ34X-usM8KPwvrOljemTfpXrzapiWT4dg7hZVbfvCky-B6R-FdL-rl4mXHOwD-OI1jzn2OWXmrXd8tlx8-FmadUwaA509NIETSytfTnYUjZfdkqWId9x52imJl0DILQZVe4K9yv0kLMu07VeI7AwPPLUcArd20593Po8bLGLaOcEch8BNwSoDYlL1UpKBHBUXnJ4mck152ieEmIY%3D)**
* **Volunteer** – Take some time to serve others by volunteering for an organization that’s important to you.
* **Watch a Military Documentary** – Sometimes it’s hard to fully understand the experiences our veterans bring home, and the sacrifices they have made. Listening to them share their experiences can help us try to grasp their sacrifice. We recommend Ken Burns’ documentaries – **[The War,](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=c4c07d65aa6d4864bab1dbfcd29d38c0&_e=KfsExKl82rof2M-1XGZMfWDVY0LQMy87vaQS_mqNKk1L6qcsxKkydebPg_7b7g4-FmMcDgCgN822h49KpuPAhIyAz6337Ud6wJW_By4WmlBTod5evqq6r12hdzhznuSGowu0edORuRhOc6oaMEbOL2ETeKu49ZBe-hOxYP0JCgVByenAXNeNGbwrEUXnd5JZEa_tKUJyiA6WD1lOQzar_wKsNz8l_2pQiOs8ZwHezhweGs7QgHrgJVFZTXmZ6ayRTMkHU-HFiv1qnUqYPymh6YaHqYOExtQi9zCfL8Zw7Lw88U5hyN1axChrKM-Wij7jcw2ejTLXzvrCxtoUaMaxkEojdnh2MNmdjYfyBsy5qV89rHvrti-j48dSGTMUX9UVGcOwNvtD2Dtd8a0vSHCBvw%3D%3D) [The Vietnam War,](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=c4c07d65aa6d4864bab1dbfcd29d38c0&_e=KfsExKl82rof2M-1XGZMfWDVY0LQMy87vaQS_mqNKk07YgzejeL84tgJQFmfagKwqwBwy70jADzshD1Tn_lzeNv36SiTrUtmgNVIFzIqc3kgQEa4H_D9iFQw6fz8GR4DvONaCf79nxPjk00-vb1nRQkKnluuUBr7ASkyxRwQJJxWucc1h4PRQN_ONRGHxxxkEQd13uilt_W8Imz_clHeHs_JvtG3v5jTAKBE0fwc2KAFQinH6RPeM7R-8Zq85odYWgPMiu2cZfoRz0MtvLlTbgzMBV0D6bwKcj1mUqCH0k2nQLiXbzeFcw4G6_lv8PsPicUznP8_8mzeuTBe-UuzDcko9LGb19EnaCy5sAHEP9gBZW7XaClghRNWSSOfz-y3DTGqF2j_KGafGW8Qyb_Niw%3D%3D)** and **[The Civil War.](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=c4c07d65aa6d4864bab1dbfcd29d38c0&_e=KfsExKl82rof2M-1XGZMfWDVY0LQMy87vaQS_mqNKk3l2Peg8vZRNJQo5bg2F2ITAajeGq7PDSb78SwlM7xv8JOSrIxhd3khbdYbUcnpY4UAk3jHWwzZFt0Qpat4OOLmne2_o2hWovEGxXu_XrLaDcXoKwtxcBRBp9Tw1VNa24WtnihSgTTfE3WvYNjA-QfYB-MbEb54lP3PGr0sBUuUM-igFyiqSuPFsXxYp0YS14kAzutA4loCNqfzP1NACNGfIrexU3UQWcpk4kDS1YKGGA86Jj4NdrWMfDWFBXBG313s4mqv4IsFsUxhqDYRlqs4kheJ2qRTpBXIlcBpHYsSvUcQIbEPTGi9TWgjpHBwIkrnKjlcwQdU8FVzaHKvZaWKXOAecu_98k3OhdzlMnyyBw%3D%3D)**
* **Read Ernie Pyle’s War Columns** – This Hoosier was a war correspondent during World War II, and shared the stories of the soldiers fighting on the front lines with the entire world. [**You can read some of his remarkable columns here.**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=c4c07d65aa6d4864bab1dbfcd29d38c0&_e=HsJhRmvChE0KsxaiAvIxQ0pPWNEyi9huYTLmvHKk1DL2_yb1FybzzXoGdsYd727KCWBAQ8YYFwV2glXGeQo65LbH-o0m12gAIhKYkk1Uw_k-q7jM4ByHqt9_YsYagBd0tqQfCeTHUdsqy5mVzbQSVF8lpBrLdJfLBwx1Ndx3QZnteko2qW5974haDImgM8bFhtgoHUBvpouQmCg-eVpMoTrCXgcDmdcsJl080U5WdG7nEBkM7rYbkSW9LYwH5UcbvsYMkVyD8yGkOFS2e_GU4YpI5yKljN3jWwAjld0Y2cBYSPoSHhpi26b8arIYZin7A_DSn-v6QV5XAowJ4bAxtt3oPddmsgJ7lFAoPc8EVZ2QdKWjew_ra-yfJMEW3P8C-XxzYaVtMIf7_HITP1pt1Ul6cYPXn-DQPthXWj0yyE4gc_XJExQ2NUV0Xlo8YsIl)
* **Post Your Tribute on Social Media** – Since we can’t go out and attend Memorial Day ceremonies or parades, join other Americans showing their gratitude online for our veterans and fallen heroes. Post your appreciation on social media using the hashtag #MemorialDay!
* **Check in on a Vet in Your Life** – Memorial Day is for those who died, but we can never forget those who lived. With all that’s going on now, check in on a veteran in your life – a family member, a friend, neighbor, fellow church-goer. A phone call can go a long way.

We hope that you find our suggestions useful and that they help you honor our fallen heroes this Memorial Day.
#INThisTogether, -Your Holcomb Crew

clean_body: This year, Memorial Day weekend will look a little different in towns and cities across Indiana. Friend, This year, Memorial Day weekend will look a little different in towns and cities across Indiana. It will be a little bit quieter and a little less raucous — the Indy 500 will run in August, and many other large gatherings are also postponed. But one thing can’t be postponed. We must honor our heroes no matter what, including every single Hoosier who has made the ultimate sacrifice while serving our nation in uniform. Memorial Day has its roots in the period following the Civil War — which saw the largest number of American military casualties of any war in our history. Honoring those who lost their lives defending our freedoms is a tradition that we must keep, no matter the circumstances. Here are some ways that you can honor our fallen service members while staying safe this Memorial Day: Fly Your Flag – There’s no better way to honor America than flying our colors – red, white and blue! Visit a War Memorial – Our state’s capital city, Indianapolis, has more acreage dedicated to honoring our fallen heroes than any other U.S. city – and the city’s number of war memorials is only second to Washington, D.C. Due to COVID-19, you won’t be able to go inside these monuments, but you can plan socially-distanced visits outside. Support our Service Organizations – Service organizations like the American Legion (headquartered in Indiana!), the Veterans of Foreign Wars, AMVETS, and others are run by our veterans and honor their fellow servicemembers they have lost. Consider supporting these organizations as they’ve supported us. Light a Candle – Light a candle and put it on your front porch at dusk to light our communities in remembrance of our fallen heroes. Have a Moment of Silence – As an act of symbolic unity, join Americans across the country for a moment of silence at 3 p.m. local time on Memorial Day. Visit a Military Cemetery – Take a moment to visit the final resting place of those who gave their lives defending freedom. Volunteer – Take some time to serve others by volunteering for an organization that’s important to you. Watch a Military Documentary – Sometimes it’s hard to fully understand the experiences our veterans bring home, and the sacrifices they have made. Listening to them share their experiences can help us try to grasp their sacrifice. We recommend Ken Burns’ documentaries – and Read Ernie Pyle’s War Columns – This Hoosier was a war correspondent during World War II, and shared the stories of the soldiers fighting on the front lines with the entire world. Post Your Tribute on Social Media – Since we can’t go out and attend Memorial Day ceremonies or parades, join other Americans showing their gratitude online for our veterans and fallen heroes. Post your appreciation on social media using the hashtag #MemorialDay! Check in on a Vet in Your Life** – Memorial Day is for those who died, but we can never forget those who lived. With all that’s going on now, check in on a veteran in your life – a family member, a friend, neighbor, fellow church-goer. A phone call can go a long way. We hope that you find our suggestions useful and that they help you honor our fallen heroes this Memorial Day. #INThisTogether, -Your Holcomb Crew | | | | | | Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana. © Copyright 2020. body:
I am eternally grateful for your faith in me and your willingness to take a risk and put your values into action in a grassroots political campaign. | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/DwE/ni0YAA/t.31x/4G7EisBbR4K7Cseo17dvLQ/h0/EITbMdFK8sEmH288ys-2B-2Fh8ph-2FrB9A6-2BM0i5qCb2xsCyiK7xXkJftbeIVM7HbMWah-2F-2FTUy7T-2FpE-2Ban7TzilxtVHMJk6Ko3XMudiK22ctjhsmRptTnUeLyseIwv7dBH718xPTEseYtJCda87MEVbrQYDYLArY7Xig-2B5I-2FQ7qQHFsO9akR09ToXjfD4L0aaLTHToP5Fs8Lp0hc-2B34amc6Y8NeHb-2FUzjDdwXf3rcAsMpNZg-3D/lVCJ)

---
Dear Friend, First, I want to say thank you. **** I am eternally grateful for your faith in me and your willingness to take a risk and put your values into action in a grassroots political campaign. You were ready to put up a fight for something bolder and better. You were ready to step outside of your comfort zone, and to take a stand, even when there was backlash, and spite, and real political costs coming from the other side. ** ** You stood firm and committed to our vision: that everyone deserves a safe and stable place to call home, that health care is a human right, that we must address racism and poverty and bigotry, and we must achieve big change for our planet within the next decade, because we don't get another chance. ** ** You acted with urgency, and with moral clarity. Thank you. You have shown true leadership. You have shown political courage. Although the result was not what we'd wanted, we can take a lot of pride in this truly trailblazing campaign that did what many naysayers said was impossible. We made climate a central issue, if not the central issue, in this election. We believe that this is a first in a United States House of Representatives race, but it will not be the last. ** ** We canvassed in neighborhoods that a Democratic Congressional candidate hadn't set foot in for decades, possibly ever, and had real conversations with Oregonians about what is important to them -- not the Democratic establishment in DC or in Portland, not the lobbyists who run the show in Washington. ** ** Most of our volunteers, and a lot of our donors, were first timers, having never been involved in politics before. ** ** We were outspent by about one million dollars of money coming from big corporations, lobbyists, and billionaires. We did what no one, has ever, in the history of southwest Oregon even attempted. Our movement is strong. Our coalition is growing. And we're not going anywhere. You can count on me to stay in the fight. Stay tuned for whats next. Onward, Doyle Canning
---
|
---
Doyle Canning is running for Congress in Oregon's 4th Congressional District. Doyle is rejecting all corporate PAC money in this campaign. She relies on grassroots supporters like you! name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: President Trump on reopening: ‘It’s happening very rapidly’
body:
Our citizens stepped up and made incredible sacrifices. Now, it’s time to get them safely back to work. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9806b8d0c0&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • May 20, 2020
---
| | |
# **President Trump works across party lines to reopen America**

**Americans have done** an incredible job listening to local health authorities, heeding social distancing guidelines, and helping to slow the spread of COVID-19. Our citizens stepped up and made incredible sacrifices. Now, it’s time to get them safely back to work.

**“We’re going to safely reopen** our country and our economy, and it’s happening very rapidly,” President Trump said at yesterday’s Cabinet meeting.

**🇺🇸** [President Trump: America is transitioning to greatness!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6d8bc8e333&e=3ee4985eea)

**A safe, strong reopening** requires close partnership between federal and state leaders. That work continued today, as President Trump hosted Arkansas Gov. Asa Hutchinson (R) and Kansas Gov. Laura Kelly (D) at the White House. Vice President Mike Pence, meanwhile, traveled to Florida to meet with Gov. Ron DeSantis (R).

**FEMA and others** are helping ensure each state is stocked up with critical resources. “In our drive to crush the virus, the U.S. has completed nearly 12 million tests,” President Trump said yesterday. “What has been done with testing, what’s been done with ventilators, what’s been done with the distribution of product has been incredible.”

**Arkansas, Kansas, and Florida** are no exceptions—each state has received the full support of President Trump’s Administration. In terms of testing and masks, for example:
* **Arkansas** is receiving over $78 million in testing assistance funding, along with more than 660,000 N95 masks.

* **Kansas** is receiving over $80 million in testing funds, along with 860,000 N-95 masks.

* **Florida** —one of our most populated states—is receiving over $420 million in testing funds, along with over _5 million_ masks N95 masks delivered.

[_Press Secretary: Half a billion surgical masks, 12 billion gloves and counting_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8a2a7b14fd&e=3ee4985eea)

🎬**President Trump: **[Every member of my Cabinet is working tirelessly!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=24b612f51e&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **🎬** **The President and First Lady honor acts of heroism**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=58dad9b556&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **During this pandemic, **Americans from all walks of life have risen to the occasion to lift up their communities. A few days ago, President Trump and First Lady Melania Trump recognized some of these heroes in a ceremony at the White House.

**“The First Lady and I** are thrilled to welcome you this afternoon for our second event recognizing extraordinary Americans who have responded to the invisible enemy,” the President said. He praised their “exceptional bravery and commitment and love.”

**Each of these Americans** has an incredible, inspiring story to share. For example:
* [West Virginia nurse Amy Ford](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=45aee75f60&e=3ee4985eea) answered the call to help New Yorkers at the height of the crisis.

* [Ben Ross and his team launched “Masks by Makers,”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8ecef11a23&e=3ee4985eea) a campaign to produce and distribute protective masks to medical workers free of charge.

* [Girl Scout Troop 744](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=23e718cee8&e=3ee4985eea) donated 100 boxes of Girl Scout cookies to local firefighters, doctors, and nurses.

**“The bonds that unite** us in times of hardship can also raise us to new heights as we reopen and recover and rebuild,” President Trump said.

**MORE:** [“Trump, first lady honor heroes of coronavirus crisis in Rose Garden ceremony”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e0f4fedeff&e=3ee4985eea)

clean_body: Our citizens stepped up and made incredible sacrifices. Now, it’s time to get them safely back to work. | | | | | The White House • May 20, 2020 | | | President Trump works across party lines to reopen America Americans have done an incredible job listening to local health authorities, heeding social distancing guidelines, and helping to slow the spread of COVID-19. Our citizens stepped up and made incredible sacrifices. Now, it’s time to get them safely back to work. “We’re going to safely reopen our country and our economy, and it’s happening very rapidly,” President Trump said at yesterday’s Cabinet meeting. 🇺🇸 A safe, strong reopening requires close partnership between federal and state leaders. That work continued today, as President Trump hosted Arkansas Gov. Asa Hutchinson (R) and Kansas Gov. Laura Kelly (D) at the White House. Vice President Mike Pence, meanwhile, traveled to Florida to meet with Gov. Ron DeSantis (R). FEMA and others are helping ensure each state is stocked up with critical resources. “In our drive to crush the virus, the U.S. has completed nearly 12 million tests,” President Trump said yesterday. “What has been done with testing, what’s been done with ventilators, what’s been done with the distribution of product has been incredible.” Arkansas, Kansas, and Florida are no exceptions—each state has received the full support of President Trump’s Administration. In terms of testing and masks, for example: Arkansas is receiving over $78 million in testing assistance funding, along with more than 660,000 N95 masks. Kansas is receiving over $80 million in testing funds, along with 860,000 N-95 masks. Florida —one of our most populated states—is receiving over $420 million in testing funds, along with over 5 million masks N95 masks delivered. 🎬President Trump: | | 🎬 The President and First Lady honor acts of heroism | | During this pandemic, Americans from all walks of life have risen to the occasion to lift up their communities. A few days ago, President Trump and First Lady Melania Trump recognized some of these heroes in a ceremony at the White House. “The First Lady and I are thrilled to welcome you this afternoon for our second event recognizing extraordinary Americans who have responded to the invisible enemy,” the President said. He praised their “exceptional bravery and commitment and love.” Each of these Americans has an incredible, inspiring story to share. For example: answered the call to help New Yorkers at the height of the crisis. a campaign to produce and distribute protective masks to medical workers free of charge. donated 100 boxes of Girl Scout cookies to local firefighters, doctors, and nurses. “The bonds that unite us in times of hardship can also raise us to new heights as we reopen and recover and rebuild,” President Trump said. MORE: | | Photo of the Day | | President Trump meets with his Cabinet in the East Room of the White House | May 19, 2020 | | | | | | The White House 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

body:
Illinois Democrats keep finding new ways to mismanage COVID-19 relief funds. Stand with Darin against them [ ](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=b26cad78c62b48288f8a740ac7bdfc7b&_e=QD3FkD2bpGnLifhuCbxFAWAqZu2CnkaD-xnDaEDBK5FZsXyUoDHYjYBJzFrtfKntftEu-9nm9c86br2yqtfZUr8ZpRRw63aVuYUdrsJjhf3mfTAcTneu6J9J4yutBcTts8F1hWh0zVXdqwZQO1TTrRTYTPC0I4TXBdAPta0l1WeDngYWQvtoZX89xV1GKtGfRJ56Y_wmZXp5GOsM7fs0gRh2v0fazXs7mn7_5T8MhZCjv3MQti8AAsL_VC6PdZV_AduDtms1WoWvaRF3OiHEJVp38NGPgV_PUBmmHk5zlSbZLhj1UWROcq1651oKSPUlEyrZMW84jOjEepXhCI-IIwDVv2kIxvpCWVYSf-8WwL9s75BsOcMHyO6YqRYfHU6uphNGh-LjI4OTVpBNVF34-iLbjw3wkP2tSJuf63hWSbhhLtF7cgd0LA-jmg33i8li944N7xrCQFD4ulP99tIimzz9XiD3g4IDl-OxNw9XAPI%3D) | |

Friend,

For decades, career politicians with no concept of a balanced budget have worked night and day to dig the state of Illinois into a $192 billion hole.

_**Now, those same career politicians are asking Congress for $44 billion in COVID-19 relief funds to bail out Illinois’s overdrafted pension fund.**_
[**ADD YOUR NAME: REJECT THE ILLINOIS PENSION BAILOUT**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=b26cad78c62b48288f8a740ac7bdfc7b&_e=QD3FkD2bpGnLifhuCbxFAWAqZu2CnkaD-xnDaEDBK5FZsXyUoDHYjYBJzFrtfKntftEu-9nm9c86br2yqtfZUr8ZpRRw63aVuYUdrsJjhf3mfTAcTneu6J9J4yutBcTts8F1hWh0zVXdqwZQO1TTrRTYTPC0I4TXBdAPta0l1WeDngYWQvtoZX89xV1GKtGfRJ56Y_wmZXp5GOsM7fs0gRh2v0fazXs7mn7_5T8MhZCjv3MQti8AAsL_VC6PdZV_AduDtms1WoWvaRF3OiHEJcFJOVpTgAwGMjyDzJST4xOyErRNELbSw0mBVAZ4fkrM0NMdarRb2ZudAi3jTP__FDVuMJS93wDHTFmFkJB5CD4aAcsH5CVR7RE4rOm9ypSLFG1OsU_SfmQkENccbpVn26OUplnX2BA-rAJuX59yAdhRBPsnq-HrPs5dhHp-HFfAXiALNiGHbD314FfiLfNr244g1fLbB9tELZYzaWG1BQA%3D)
These relief dollars – paid by taxpayers just like you – should only end up in the pockets of America’s farmers, small business owners, and working families – **not self-serving politicians.**

Darin is taking a firm stand against Illinois Senate leaders on this issue. Will you join him?
[**ADD YOUR NAME: REJECT THE ILLINOIS PENSION BAILOUT**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=b26cad78c62b48288f8a740ac7bdfc7b&_e=QD3FkD2bpGnLifhuCbxFAWAqZu2CnkaD-xnDaEDBK5FZsXyUoDHYjYBJzFrtfKntftEu-9nm9c86br2yqtfZUr8ZpRRw63aVuYUdrsJjhf3mfTAcTneu6J9J4yutBcTts8F1hWh0zVXdqwZQO1TTrRTYTPC0I4TXBdAPta0l1WeDngYWQvtoZX89xV1GKtGfRJ56Y_wmZXp5GOsM7fs0gRh2v0fazXs7mn7_5T8MhZCjv3MQti8AAsL_VC6PdZV_AduDtms1WoWvaRF3OiHEJd-y2MKJsXZppTRCXcBa1embiISHVcOGYvOErCDCR8uzh_4hVqBZQ4K8lQdgXm_Jd4Au86GS_yFpl0OejpzCw8SDqSKrpMhzyk-D9Y2B8iIEk5r_6-_nv_4yxavn7OftiXqo_-DmtGOXeZUfPBXF3-yuDDT7S6JLysp4jlkNH1bIvRxjFCLAKUJaWygsp0uohhbPjuNmvi-b7oGc-sHOGGU%3D)
Friend, the pension bailout isn’t the only way Illinois is mismanaging COVID-19 relief dollars.

Governor Pritzker is working hard to block those funds from going to localities that violate his stay-at-home order – _**as if the order wasn’t harmful enough already to our small businesses.**_

Darin isn’t backing down. He teamed up with the other four Illinois House Republicans to stand up to Governor Pritzker’s power grab. **Will you stand up with Darin for our farmers, businesses, and workers?**
[**ADD YOUR NAME: REJECT PRITZKER’S POWER GRAB**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=b26cad78c62b48288f8a740ac7bdfc7b&_e=QD3FkD2bpGnLifhuCbxFAWAqZu2CnkaD-xnDaEDBK5FZsXyUoDHYjYBJzFrtfKntftEu-9nm9c86br2yqtfZUr8ZpRRw63aVuYUdrsJjhf3mfTAcTneu6J9J4yutBcTts8F1hWh0zVXdqwZQO1TTrRTYTPC0I4TXBdAPta0l1WeDngYWQvtoZX89xV1GKtGfRJ56Y_wmZXp5GOsM7fs0gRh2v0fazXs7mn7_5T8MhZCjv3MQti8AAsL_VC6PdZV_AduDtms1WoWvaRF3OiHEJT4HQry0p-68FsHDxlCcdQotXd5miO0dV8rgne1zM43q0Tsp6SIGkuc6lpr2ur6iJ8zUbqSN2Y76wMrqMK17PKFuqyEjVP6Wo4s9eThI8LP3m0-YNiL77GkpXvstpdd6udMocHFyJitrVWI3XkdIorRIRGE162JxGAnHC8UUFJetyeaZjBMnu9kfYFrUpcFTk2uFpcAIpcGXCFXkFDeqguo%3D)
Thank you,
